subject: What one incredible American just told President Trump
body:
Amy Wright’s coffee business has five locations and about 120 workers, all of whom have intellectual or developmental disabilities. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29b9faa9ea&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 28, 2020
---
| | |
# **The incredible story President Trump just heard**

**Amy Wright’s** coffee business has five locations and about 120 workers, all of whom have intellectual or developmental disabilities. When the Coronavirus pandemic struck, she had to close her stores and temporarily lay off these hardworking employees.

**For most of them** , Bitty & Beau’s Coffee is their first job. It offers a source of stability and meaningful wages to help them save for the future. Like many Americans these past few months, they felt fear and uncertainty about when the next paycheck would come.

**This month** , Wright’s small business was approved for a Paycheck Protection Program loan. As a result, “all of our employees are back on the payroll today,” she says.

**“At Bitty & Beau's,** we like to use the phrase called ‘not broken,’” employee Michael Heup said today. “I know the great country of the United States isn't broken, either.”

🎬[ Employee: We’re not “broken”—and neither is this great country.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=986fe8aa26&e=3ee4985eea)

**The Paycheck Protection Program** (PPP) officially relaunched yesterday. After distributing $350 billion in loans to 1.6 million small businesses earlier this month, the program ran out of funds in just 14 days. Thanks to pressure from President Trump, Congressional Democrats eventually agreed to replenish the popular program.

**The President** [signed that $310 billion funding](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ab292653e9&e=3ee4985eea) refill into law on Friday. This afternoon, he welcomed small business owners to the White House to share their stories from the first successful round of loans in early April:
* [Wright has said](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e71e0edc7d&e=3ee4985eea) that her business-saving loan “is a game-changer for us.”

* [Ed and Jim’s Body Shop in Pennsylvania](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=78dd2702c8&e=3ee4985eea) has been in business for over 50 years. As Coronavirus forced Americans to stay home, owner Brandon Hutson had to lay off most of his workers. Now, the shop can reemploy its furloughed staff and provide each of them with a paycheck—a “live-saver for us,” Hutson says.

* [Tony Stafford](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b9f234dbf6&e=3ee4985eea) had to furlough over 100 employees when he was forced to close the dining rooms of his 3 restaurants in Virginia. “I promised every one of [my workers] we would get through this,” he said. “When we applied and received the PPP loan, I knew that I would be able to keep that promise.”

* [JD Clark](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=96e1a9155b&e=3ee4985eea) is a construction and maintenance firm specializing in low-income and affordable housing. All of its contracts were put on hold because of Coronavirus. Owner Tisa Clark describes talking to one of her employees, a single mother, after securing a PPP loan. “I could just see the relief coming to her!” Ms. Clark said.

**With last week’s signing** , President Trump has now allocated more than $670 billion for the loan program in total. During PPP’s first run, the Small Business Administration and the Treasury Department processed 14 years’ worth of loans in less than 14 days.

**These loans** have helped save 30 million American jobs so far. That number is expected to climb to over _60 million_ with this latest round of support.

🎬 **President Trump:**[Americans are ready for our great economy to REOPEN! ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=53072ba0a0&e=3ee4985eea)

**LEARN MORE:** [Unprecedented action to protect American workers](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=afb310166d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## 🎬 **WATCH: Military flyover for our medical heroes!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=845f9b225a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Military pilots** from the U.S. Navy Blue Angels and the U.S. Air Force Thunderbirds performed flyovers of New York City and Philadelphia today, honoring some of America’s incredible medical workers during this Coronavirus pandemic.

**“What we're doing** is we're paying tribute to our front line health care workers confronting COVID,” President Trump said when he announced the flyovers last week. “And it's really a signal to all Americans to remain vigilant during the outbreak.”

[Read more: Trump says Thunderbirds, Blue Angels will do flyovers across country](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42cf8079a8&e=3ee4985eea)
---

subject: It's time for Puerto Rico to become an OFFICIAL state

body:
|

[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04cf/72412298/4fb2d4e4/61048074/863557906/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200428_PuertoRico_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200428_PuertoRico_U1_X1")

| | Puerto Rico is home to more than 3.6 million American citizens. They've fought in every single armed conflict involving the United States for nearly 120 years and are a part of the United States. But Puerto Rico isn't a state -- Puerto Ricans are denied the ability to vote for President, don't have a single voting member in Congress, have zero Senators, and pay into social safety net programs that they aren't able to tap into because Puerto Rico isn't a state. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - **Puerto Rico is home to more than 3.6 million American citizens.** They've fought in every single armed conflict involving the United States for nearly 120 years and are a part of the United States. _But Puerto Rico isn 't a state_ \-- Puerto Ricans are denied the ability to vote for President, don't have a single voting member in Congress, have zero Senators, and pay into social safety net programs that they aren't able to tap into because Puerto Rico isn't a state. This injustice must come to an end: [**Sign your name if you believe Puerto Rico should be allowed to begin the process of becoming a state ->**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04cf/72412298/4fb2d4e4/61048077/863557906/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiMTgzMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200428_PuertoRico_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Sign+your+name+if+you+believe+Puerto+Ric&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200428_PuertoRico_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200428_PuertoRico_U1_X1") [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04cf/72412298/4fb2d4e4/61048076/863557906/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiMTgzMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200428_PuertoRico_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200428_PuertoRico_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200428_PuertoRico_U1_X1") | | | [Support statehood](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04cf/72412298/4fb2d4e4/61048079/863557906/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiMTgzMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200428_PuertoRico_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Support+statehood&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200428_PuertoRico_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200428_PuertoRico_U1_X1")
---
Puerto Rican statehood would fully franchise and give full legal and constitutional rights to nearly 3.7 million Americans (larger than SEVERAL states).
And in the event of natural disasters like Hurricane Maria and climate change, it would give them a seat at the biggest decision-making table in Congress to advocate for the millions who are impacted.
**Our country was founded on the principle of no taxation without due representation.** For nearly 120 years, that's been denied to millions who proudly pay into programs they can't access and serve in the frontlines of our wars.
They deserve to vote. They deserve to be heard. And they deserve to have a state of their own: _It 's time for Puerto Rico to become a state._
**Add your name: [Let's get 10,000 signatures in the next 24-hours from Americans who support Puerto Rican statehood ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04cf/72412298/4fb2d4e4/61048078/863557906/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiMTgzMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200428_PuertoRico_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Letrsquos+get+10000+signatures+in+the+ne&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200428_PuertoRico_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200428_PuertoRico_U1_X1")**

name: MJ Hegar
subject: 18 years is a long time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Unlike Sen. Cornyn, I won't cater to the special interests. I'll stand with Texans.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ed/7f51f7bc/4fc1526d/4ef179c9/834281909/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

**Sen. John Cornyn has been in the Senate for 18 years. That 's a long time. **

That's 18 years of Texans having a senator who thinks it's A-OK to buddy up with his D.C. boss, Mitch McConnell, and put wealthy special interests first. Meanwhile, working people across our state face the skyrocketing costs of health care, child care, and a quality college education.

_Y 'all, that's not okay by me._ Not by a long shot. We need to flip the Senate in November and replace Sen. Cornyn with someone willing to stand up for Texans.

**[That's why I'm in this race. Will you chip in to help me reach my $60,000 end-of-month goal? Your donation will be matched for _double the impact_.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ed/7f51f7bc/4fc1526d/4ef179ce/834281909/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprileommatch?refcode=email_20200428.3nd__1309__&amount=10")**

As a combat veteran and a working mom who's faced the same challenges working families deal with every day -- like figuring out how to afford health care, child care, and keeping the mortgage paid -- I will always put working families first.

**_Unlike Sen. Cornyn, I won 't spend my time in the Senate catering to the special interests._ I'll stand with Texans -- always. **

We need to send Sen. John Cornyn home if we're going to flip the Senate. **[And I need your help to win this race. Right now, all donations are being matched ahead of our $60,000 end-of-month deadline. If you're able to, please contribute today.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900ed/7f51f7bc/4fc1526d/4ef179ce/834281909/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprileommatch?refcode=email_20200428.3nd__1309__&amount=10")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4da9/4bd7760e/5b69cf9d/77af6182/3960514592/VEsHBA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=11+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_200428_1mc-1m5xAT_none_rs_4_trumpapprovals_r2&source=314_EM_SV_200428_1mc-1m5xAT_none_rs_4_trumpapprovals_r2&subsource=314_EM_SV_200428_1mc-1m5xAT_none_rs_4_trumpapprovals_r2")** to make a donation.

name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty Shares Latest On Beijing Biden
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-jy/) April 28, 2020 [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-r/) **Beijing Biden** This week, Bill released a new digital ad hitting Joe Biden for years of cozying up to the Communist Chinese regime. As President Donald Trump continues to stand up to China and hold them accountable for the Wuhan virus, Beijing Biden defends Communist China and even repeats their talking points. In the Senate, Bill will continue to stand with President Trump to push back against the Communist regime's propaganda and hold them accountable for what has become the crime of the century. To share this video, visit Bill's **[Twitter](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-y/) **and **[Facebook.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-j/)** **JOIN: Movie Night With #TeamHagerty ** **You're Invited To Join #TeamHagerty Movie Night This Friday!** During this time of staying apart, we want to stay connected with you. What better way to do that than to watch a movie together and order pizza from a local restaurant. Each week, you're invited to join in from the comfort of your own home. Check out Bill's **[Facebook](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-t/)** for all the details about what movie we're watching this week. Make sure to RSVP and share pictures of you and your family to stay connected!
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-i/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-d/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-h/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-k/) **Bill Hagerty: 'We Need Business People Like Me to Stand Up to These Radical Socialists'**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-u/) **Bill Hagerty Schedules Town Hall with Donald Trump's National Economic Council Director Larry Kudlow**[Breitbart:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-m/) **Tennessee Senate Candidate Bill Hagerty: What the Chinese Regime Has Done Is the 'Crime of the Century'**[OANN:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-c/) **Pandemic Exposes Reliance On China In U.S. Supply Chain
## **What They're Saying...**
> _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-q/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" After looking Bill in the eye, I can fully vouch for the fact that he is a pro-life, Second Amendment custodian in full support of our president's agenda. Without hesitation, I intend to support and vote for him and humbly ask that you do as well."_
> _[-](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-f/)_[ Jeff Broyles](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty will work with President Trump, just as he did while Ambassador to Japan, to protect our farmers and make sure that they are treated fairly when it comes to trade. He has my support to be Tennessee's next Senator."_
> [-Mayor Rick Graham](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-plyhilt-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" Bill Hagerty is running for the United States Senate to combat the radical socialists and their agenda. I know Bill will stand with President Donald Trump to protect my conservative values and the conservative values of so many Tennesseans across the state."_

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: This new Executive Order helps eliminate barriers to care
disclaimer_text: paid for by their insurer
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
As we continue to combat COVID-19 here in Rhode Island, we must do everything we can to support our health care providers who are working around the clock under extraordinary circumstances. The last thing they need right now is to be dealing with burdensome regulations, and we need to make sure they have the flexibility to get paid without hassle. At the same time, many patients are worried that they'll lose access to critical medications or services. That's unacceptable.
That's why I signed an [executive order](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o1PVfHlk8FoYqCJVEjpPQQvPr3jOwWy2A9RiwEaMrNsAu5swv2N6pAxRDVZ2paThOZoBG2L1S3YOqbJOc5rbyEgLhx8hqMVq55GawfEqEMQlIHVOL9Ykvx4ygRrIxMJs1ts8XLcf9qKQUS8iz77s1MrT-NLeNBXQk3oVQW_YxAEEwEmAzQ2hA7GKjogDjys3fXTlWGO3Eik=&c=bJ5z2SagulAV12pGsaBK4J0Uy0llGLM_OP0aDc8G2GTPJAgNZSWuQA==&ch=LgPh6ajYorJlPWCNY_fSgT-YeLWe-RKEjA2DFqg1PcDFnCrzJ-LFVA==) that will allow relax onerous regulations and eliminate barriers to care during this crisis.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o1PVfHlk8FoYqCJVEjpPQQvPr3jOwWy2A9RiwEaMrNsAu5swv2N6pKrKn3faRvYCIEMMfOXsG4RgKPj3N01YvayIibCXrHxpebTnuT5PyuGPrPQmd0z6kXBSVzQd5VmMNmRKgIXx-iI4pMF7cDNrlnf8-0sCtuFoc-0KxINrkQnrYUejKOeJkGaYX0G087_gAVzQ4J8SI2E=&c=bJ5z2SagulAV12pGsaBK4J0Uy0llGLM_OP0aDc8G2GTPJAgNZSWuQA==&ch=LgPh6ajYorJlPWCNY_fSgT-YeLWe-RKEjA2DFqg1PcDFnCrzJ-LFVA==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o1PVfHlk8FoYqCJVEjpPQQvPr3jOwWy2A9RiwEaMrNsAu5swv2N6pKrKn3faRvYCIEMMfOXsG4RgKPj3N01YvayIibCXrHxpebTnuT5PyuGPrPQmd0z6kXBSVzQd5VmMNmRKgIXx-iI4pMF7cDNrlnf8-0sCtuFoc-0KxINrkQnrYUejKOeJkGaYX0G087_gAVzQ4J8SI2E=&c=bJ5z2SagulAV12pGsaBK4J0Uy0llGLM_OP0aDc8G2GTPJAgNZSWuQA==&ch=LgPh6ajYorJlPWCNY_fSgT-YeLWe-RKEjA2DFqg1PcDFnCrzJ-LFVA==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| The order signed includes the following protections through May 27:

* Medications: Your out-of-pocket costs for prescriptions will not increase, and the medicine you take will not be dropped from coverage. Insures cannot make changes to what drugs are covered unless the changes benefit the patients.

* Provider Referrals: In most cases, without a primary care physician's referral, a patient's visit to a specialist will not be paid for by their insurer. As a result of this order, insurers will need to relax this process to allow much more time and leniency. There will be no referrals needed for telehealth, which is currently a major source of community care delivery in our state and is fully covered by all insurers as a result of a [previous executive order](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o1PVfHlk8FoYqCJVEjpPQQvPr3jOwWy2A9RiwEaMrNsAu5swv2N6pGOZkd8UvcDTyxkLas91U2aOBzCfiK2f3yrvl7CHzD7hjMDd6Djx_9SErzvnbYpAhNJnoSOViX3O2JqlV7lZH64SiRZRxsBzsjTybe-e8HEYd5JRV-kKxNxdclld0XXXMoW6slo8M80EMQNY8GjBZu0=&c=bJ5z2SagulAV12pGsaBK4J0Uy0llGLM_OP0aDc8G2GTPJAgNZSWuQA==&ch=LgPh6ajYorJlPWCNY_fSgT-YeLWe-RKEjA2DFqg1PcDFnCrzJ-LFVA==).

* Prior Authorization: We have to ensure that patients in need of care can get it quickly and without anxiety about who is going to pay. Healthcare should not be delayed because of a need to get prior approval from a patient's insurer. So I've order that in-patient hospital and rehabilitation, long-term care and telemedicine in-network services not be suspended because someone doesn't have prior authorization. In addition, there will be no prior authorization needed for testing or treatment of COVID-19.

* Behavioral Health Care: Being able to seek mental and behavioral health care is just as important as physical health care. We have to make sure Rhode Islanders are able to deal with challenges like anxiety, depression and substance-use disorders as we're coping with this crisis. As a result of this order, no referrals or other benefit review approvals will be needed for a patient to access needed mental and behavioral health care.

---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o1PVfHlk8FoYqCJVEjpPQQvPr3jOwWy2A9RiwEaMrNsAu5swv2N6pGOZkd8UvcDTre5B_lzxIOoKU04C4Tz3UIBJTp94LI3SuN36QV6KWRWHifFgnirjreJL8exZi2NuhuaFoooJ2Y0L9XQJS6FucaisjRVIb20Ved4ygnfwWM415w0_z7owxXDeXTJ8SinWKTeThFoQS0o7oEgNzTiawscrtrtw4emBg-SKDxAMS4oCeQmm9-LxSg==&c=bJ5z2SagulAV12pGsaBK4J0Uy0llGLM_OP0aDc8G2GTPJAgNZSWuQA==&ch=LgPh6ajYorJlPWCNY_fSgT-YeLWe-RKEjA2DFqg1PcDFnCrzJ-LFVA==)
---
| I know that there are still a number of barriers we need to overcome to make sure that everyone has access to affordable care during this crisis. But, this order will protect both medical professionals and patients by cutting down on red tape and protecting existing health coverage. I am going to continue fighting to ensure all Rhode Islanders can get the care they need to make it through this crisis healthy and safe.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o1PVfHlk8FoYqCJVEjpPQQvPr3jOwWy2A9RiwEaMrNsAu5swv2N6pGOZkd8UvcDT6vaIxQnPMwAprTyz98JKz3rfmhJQXn0Es5p_y20rXVwKP8EZGkQFBBPN4xSUbaaHk0FJHfRvQ1NW-SsHJj0nqXIAHBO8X3thR2iXFWt_ySO24int0-BSNHh8w1KHhiPTzxcGkHEn6InNQunU_gD-qX9VKxwL-5uHp50lUypLGQi4sYzf_uNx_efanqytjH9CtTaw44TcT_2oFuRfn_9zcVdT_eunM2lb2svtVV98AqeUE45yHFVyMH1zODm1GWBpMPabV326hqk=&c=bJ5z2SagulAV12pGsaBK4J0Uy0llGLM_OP0aDc8G2GTPJAgNZSWuQA==&ch=LgPh6ajYorJlPWCNY_fSgT-YeLWe-RKEjA2DFqg1PcDFnCrzJ-LFVA==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=1995a513-5f39-47fe-99af-a19b3b7272c1)

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with

subject: Congress, President Trump Protect Veterans Benefits during COVID-19

The shift in schools during pandemic has left many veterans to wonder: will I still see my GI Bill benefits?
| [ ](https://ir.t.hubspotstarter.net/e2t/c/*W2p0l5x3mm1lrN5BMPHs2VKKJ0/*W76kYMS5JzYWMVDKpkZ8DLGLM0/5/f18dQhb0SmhX8XJbp2N8ky44xHyjJqVRbwtn8pTv1MN3hHhdGVMsQMVnQ9Qq8-yrshW4chNdg8Xlfb2W54pDFQ54F_DtW8X0-rk30THXyW549CGt4dQb0wW2MTPSp8W2c9WW32CQ2l8jxMNSW1Vx3W43CPQ_BW5D8zFF3wr0nkW5DFWr25mKjF6W3m2gKm2DLpc_W52Ylfx3_8mplW9fgwMT4gFb8GN1GMMcjqB-wMW85CRqK2g3586W7ttCxY3qzk9MN6XvhyNpYbW4W5ZnDst4dh6QvN11KKbNqhN8KW6cYKlt8j8P8JW77cPHY2Ph0rvW4Qrb4P4bzdlrW4C4R6877t4ydW2sBDn65Z4RQPV4slhZ3MYNT-W3PMF4C8csLSqW10360J5lK1vTW5D10Lr3ZVSLbVxw8tv2jkgMlW49FShz3vjsYVW2bd8LJ7hq_qbW2MJ8JM813VdlW708Qqh7v5GppW8v3Wwg1MWhN-W1MKd8-7rlLQT111)

[ ](https://ir.t.hubspotstarter.net/e2t/c/*W2p0l5x3mm1lrN5BMPHs2VKKJ0/*W3srm8t3Zky_pW80shZX6Q-h0L0/5/f18dQhb0S9r69jgN5TW8SkgbP50RnyCVq5fLJ4bYf0VW1FSlTk2P7_nXVcnTGj98RG8SW25FVD796dB4JW2yc13c2ykK2yW4rxqJV69_gWtW7cFLQQ6NwK_wW8xghZr7d72XvW1S2CFN6pRcvRW67VLkq7lcw4yW2RhyZV8ky1GmW5H-xSN5G0KzqW6jzDnT5rbPrRW5J1Nt45D7blxW6bjJ7d5lh8KjW3v7CBP3Wlz2MW5RXcQ25D7MPnW1gc9Cg5lN3j7W1B8DDt6CnYY-N6dNfrHz84YKW1VJryk5lX8fqW13bD4h6dkxFtW2MkX6l2_VzDrW4bFC0Z2Kv9zpW5mFVks1fQwnWV5pVfN8h-G3SVsYlP99g4nDxW1D1PQc13jyw-W5YZn613rflHdW9gJvff2KC70KW6VZrKc2r5SVLW4QrWSn3p1z_TW1fCylR2Lg8GQW8257sl8nDXWKW2rMgX34M1133W4H_8kC2MgdnMW2bP3SS6zT1DlW1cltr22YlmmYW2GD9D749WbVmW44SztX9frnm7Vn3ZzX27jhFSW26qKm84B1DJ_W5L3lDP5V9WFRW3f5_rb1xxZJmf4gTlnj04)

Hey Peter, On March 11, one of the first dominos in a long line fell due to the coronavirus pandemic: The NBA canceled its season. Many other major industries quickly followed suit - including the education sector.

As colleges swiftly moved to online learning or canceled classes altogether, many veterans who rely on GI Bill benefits began to worry. How would the pandemic and the resulting closures affect their benefits?

Rent must be paid. The family must be fed. [Fortunately, Congress and the President took action FAST — and it was good news for veterans.](https://ir.t.hubspotstarter.net/e2t/c/*W2p0l5x3mm1lrN5BMPHs2VKKJ0/*W1JF57l50JQLdN3-2Sg4XrJWv0/5/f18dQhb0S9r69jgN5TW8SkgbP50RnyCVq5fLJ4bYf0VW1FSlTk2P7_nXVcnTGj98RG8SW25FVD796dB4JW2yc13c2ykK2yW4rxqJV69_gWtW7cFLQQ6NwK_wW8xghZr7d72XvW1S2CFN6pRcvRW67VLkq7lcw4yW2RhyZV8ky1GmW5H-xSN5G0KzqW6jzDnT5rbPrRW5J1Nt45D7blxW6bjJ7d5lh8KjW3v7CBP3Wlz2MW5RXcQ25D7MPnW1gc9Cg5lN3j7W1B8DDt6CnYY-N6dNfrHz84YKW1VJryk5lX8fqW13bD4h6dkxFtW2MkX6l2_VzDrW4bFC0Z2Kv9zpW5mFVks1fQwnWV5pVfN8h-G3SVsYlP99g4nDxW1D1PQc13jyw-W5YZn613rflHdW9gJvff2KC70KW6VZrKc2r5SVLW4QrWSn3p1z_TW1fCylR2Lg8GQW8257sl8nDXWKW2rMgX34M1133W4H_8kC2MgdnMW2bP3SS6zT1DlW1cltr22YlmmYW2GD9D749WbVmW44SztX9frnm7Vn3ZzX27jhFSW26qKm84B1DJ_W5L3lDP5V9XlMW3f5_rb5DS8LTf4gTlnj04) Read more in our latest blog:

## **About Coalition for American Veterans**
[Coalition for American Veterans](https://ir.t.hubspotstarter.net/e2t/c/*W2p0l5x3mm1lrN5BMPHs2VKKJ0/*W3pcBkX8hBXqcW6nLnXf8KXS7z0/5/f18dQhb0SmhX8XJbp2N8ky44xHyjJqVRbwtn8pTv1MN3hHhdGVMsQMVnQ9Qq8-yrshW4chNdg8Xlfb2W54pDFQ54F_DtW8X0-rk30THXyW549CGt4dQb0wW2MTPSp8W2c9WW32CQ2l8jxMNSW1Vx3W43CPQ_BW5D8zFF3wr0nkW5DFWr25mKjF6W3m2gKm2DLpc_W52Ylfx3_8mplW9fgwMT4gFb8GN1GMMcjqB-wMW85CRqK2g3586W7ttCxY3qzk9MN6XvhyNpYbW4W5ZnDst4dh6QvN11KKbNqhN8KW6cYKlt8j8P8JW77cPHY2Ph0rvW4Qrb4P4bzdlrW4C4R6877t4ydW2sBDn65Z4RQPV4slhZ3MYNT-W3PMF4C8csLSqW10360J5lK1vTW5D10Lr3ZVSLbVxw8tv2jkgMlW49FShz3vjsYVW2bd8LJ7hq_qbW2MJ8JM813VdlW708Qqh7v5GppW8v3Wwg1MX6LdW1MKddd8f_pWC111) was founded by a group of citizens concerned with the treatment our veterans have received since returning from duty, going months and years without seeing their families and risking their lives, only to come home to politicians that do not support them.
---

clean_body: The shift in schools during pandemic has left many veterans to wonder: will I still see my GI Bill benefits? | | Hey Peter, On March 11, one of the first dominos in a long line fell due to the coronavirus pandemic: The NBA canceled its season. Many other major industries quickly followed suit - including the education sector. As colleges swiftly moved to online learning or canceled classes altogether, many veterans who rely on GI Bill benefits began to worry. How would the pandemic and the resulting closures affect their benefits? Rent must be paid. The family must be fed. Read more in our latest blog: | | | About Coalition for American Veterans was founded by a group of citizens concerned with the treatment our veterans have received since returning from duty, going months and years without seeing their families and risking their lives, only to come home to politicians that do not support them. | | | | Copyright © 2020 Coalition for American Veterans, All rights reserved. | Coalition for American Veterans, PO Box 790, Alexandria, VA 22313, (844) 279-6513

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: We need to switch things up -- and fast.
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1SU7eKseHpTixIYa7qEMVBQcYAQgErPT9x4rf4z9FNU=/0CavIe--58OmN1GpSjBN9DQFh7Yqbe2xnPyoqb1SEXo=)

Peter,

If you saw my email from over the weekend, then you know that Governor Cuomo has just signed an executive order mandating that absentee ballot applications be mailed to all registered New York voters. This was a smart decision and a victory for expanding access to our democracy -- but it also means that millions of New Yorkers will soon be navigating an unfamiliar electoral process.

This isn't the type of race that we were expecting. Since we won't be going door-to-door, we need to conduct all of our outreach online, by phone, and by text. We'll need the resources to ramp up our campaign tactics -- and fast. **[Will you rush in a donation before the month comes to an end this Thursday so that we can mobilize our community no matter what comes our way?](https://act.myngp.com/el/1SU7eKseHpTixIYa7qEMVBQcYAQgErPT9x4rf4z9FNU=/mySLXmDtqQe-HYJMwk-UgvEajIBcMjF5ZTXkYdZFmck=)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
******[Express Donate: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/1SU7eKseHpTixIYa7qEMVBQcYAQgErPT9x4rf4z9FNU=/mySLXmDtqQe-HYJMwk-UgvEajIBcMjF5ZTXkYdZFmck=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=express_lane_200)******
******[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/1SU7eKseHpTixIYa7qEMVBQcYAQgErPT9x4rf4z9FNU=/mySLXmDtqQe-HYJMwk-UgvEajIBcMjF5ZTXkYdZFmck=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100)******
******[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/1SU7eKseHpTixIYa7qEMVBQcYAQgErPT9x4rf4z9FNU=/mySLXmDtqQe-HYJMwk-UgvEajIBcMjF5ZTXkYdZFmck=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50)******
******[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/1SU7eKseHpTixIYa7qEMVBQcYAQgErPT9x4rf4z9FNU=/mySLXmDtqQe-HYJMwk-UgvEajIBcMjF5ZTXkYdZFmck=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other)******
Typically, the final few days before the polls open are a make-or-break moment for any campaign. But now, since voting will largely be taking place over the course of many weeks, not days, we need to mount a sustained, far-reaching effort to connect with as many voters as possible, as many times as possible, before Primary Day on June 23rd.

It won't be easy -- and it won't be cheap -- but I believe that our team has what it takes to win. **[So if you're ready to join us with less than two months to go, will you chip in $200, $100, $50, or whatever you can before our end-of-month deadline on Thursday?](https://act.myngp.com/el/1SU7eKseHpTixIYa7qEMVBQcYAQgErPT9x4rf4z9FNU=/mySLXmDtqQe-HYJMwk-UgvEajIBcMjF5ZTXkYdZFmck=)**

Best,
Adem

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17303899/189956083/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTg0ZGM1Zi0yMjhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RlB6Df0R8xEhY1ZjT5YWZ9fnXr5koT_ek4NVWjWJSJ4=&emci=f884dc5f-228a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=f984dc5f-228a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6233172)

Peter, **This crisis has changed our campaign in a number of ways. ** We were running a field-focused campaign that knocked on thousands and thousands of doors — having real conversations with people and learning what they want from their representative. We worked hard to fight the good fight on issues like keeping a rural hospital open in La Grange, protecting voting rights at the Legislature and in the courts, fighting for criminal justice reform and to prevent the execution of Rodney Reed, and more. **This has been a real transition for our campaign. I have spent my career in the classroom and the courtroom fighting for others and that is how I have run my campaign — as a vehicle for good no matter what the outcome of this election is. ** Now that we are staying in to slow the spread and protect lives, we have changed tactics while still emphasizing direct outreach to voters. One emphasis has been good old US Mail. We’ve distributed thousands of postcards to dedicated supporters who are writing to voters across the Texas 10th. We got so many requests that we ran out and had to order more! Now we have 10,000 postcards we need to fill out by the end of June.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17303905/189956136/137608104?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTg0ZGM1Zi0yMjhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RlB6Df0R8xEhY1ZjT5YWZ9fnXr5koT_ek4NVWjWJSJ4=&emci=f884dc5f-228a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=f984dc5f-228a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6233172)
**This is where you come in.** We are sending postcard packets all over the country — we provide the cards and instructions, and you write why this campaign matters to you. You can help by requesting cards to write or chipping in for postage.
[Request Your Postcards Today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17303908/189956138/137608104?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTg0ZGM1Zi0yMjhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RlB6Df0R8xEhY1ZjT5YWZ9fnXr5koT_ek4NVWjWJSJ4=&emci=f884dc5f-228a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=f984dc5f-228a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6233172) [Support our grassroots postcard team!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17303912/189956141/1382336052?refcode=em042920&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTg0ZGM1Zi0yMjhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RlB6Df0R8xEhY1ZjT5YWZ9fnXr5koT_ek4NVWjWJSJ4=)
This work is so important and we’ve been amazed to see a swell of volunteer enthusiasm during this difficult time. Let’s finish the job we started and flip this district!

Fighting for you,

Dear Friend -- Our virtual campaign requires _more_ signage, _more_ media, and _more_ advertising time than a door to door campaign would. It's not hard to understand why we are chronically unprepared for disasters. It's easy to reward voters with short-sighted policies that have immediate benefit. It's much harder to campaign on preparedness and long-term investment. And when disaster does strike, we all pay the price.
Susan Rice wrote an op-ed today titled "It's Not Enough to 'Get Back to Normal'". She writes "As we struggle through the Covid-19 crisis — the greatest challenge to global health, national security and our economy since World War II — we must ask again how we can emerge a more just, equitable and cohesive nation."

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Supporting President Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, In the race to represent New York's 27th Congressional District, I am honored to have the support of President Trump.
**Like our team, President Trump understands the importance of keeping this seat in Republican hands. But we cannot do it without your support.** [If your means allow, will you please consider making a contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/sYreatJ194QMQq6oLSn12g/MD7TNarP4wWdv7IAdN0kyw) **With the Special Election right around the corner on June 23rd, our campaign is not taking anything for granted. And we are working hard everyday to ensure we are victorious.** As we deal with the COVID-19 crisis, it becomes more apparent by the day that Republicans must take back the House and defeat Nancy Pelosi. While our small businesses and workers have struggled, she has sat on the sidelines and held up vital aid. It's just wrong, and that's why it is so critical we defeat her. Western New York and our nation simply cannot afford another two years of her as speaker. [If you agree, I hope you will consider making a donation today.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/sYreatJ194QMQq6oLSn12g/MD7TNarP4wWdv7IAdN0kyw) Sincerely, Chris Jacobs
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/sZE2xqR8rGE8SKlC892FuVgg/MD7TNarP4wWdv7IAdN0kyw) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/dWKbjh0iOFQM98O763JpZmEQ/MD7TNarP4wWdv7IAdN0kyw)

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Running for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
As our state has faced challenges related to the coronavirus, I have suspended traditional fundraising and campaigning efforts to put all of the focus of my team behind helping get Arizonans the help they need during this crisis.

I will continue devoting my time and energy to helping serve you in Congress by fighting for our small businesses, our public healthcare, working families, and getting our state back on its feet.

**But as I devote my time and energy to this important work in Congress, my campaign team is going to restart our campaign efforts to deliver the voters of AZ-09 the robust campaign that they deserve to hear our message. **

So, in the weeks to come, expect to receive more messages again from my campaign team as we gear up for the most important election of our lifetimes in November.

[**If you have the financial means to do so, will you make a contribution before Thursday 's CRITICAL DEADLINE to help me continue working for commonsense solutions for Arizona families in Congress?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CMIRrqHV-YuTxTtS1r9oudLB3B206Q7IoxEOOfUhyjI=/_0_Jo3gIcvt_Nib8nWqGHwVsGocSjKuQdUueY_UoTYw=?refcode=X_042820_EOM_A&amount=25)

name: Ryan from Team Tina
subject: Direct
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
_Please, only donate if you can afford to do so. The most important thing you can do right now is to take care of yourself and your loved ones during these challenging times._
* * *
I’ll be direct: Minnesota is a top target for Trump and the GOP. Republicans and right-wing super PACs spent millions of dollars against Tina in 2018, and Trump has publicly stated he's going to win our state this time around. **The truth is, Trump could pull it off. name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: Join our Digital Day of Action this Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/Digital%20Day%20of%20Action.png]

Fellow Democrat,

Join us on Saturday for our first Digital Day of Action! With the launch of our Adopt a Voter program and many changes in dates and deadlines for our Primary Election, we must all do our part to unify Democrats and be sure that we VOTE !

To say this is a difficult time is an understatement, but we are committed to ensuring everyone is able to exercise their right to vote and do so safely! This Saturday we will hold our first Digital Day of Action ! What does that mean for you? It means we want you to complete one or all of the following actions and play your part in a productive and victorious 2020 for Democrats!

Below are the actions we will be taking digitally on Saturday:

1. Sign up to participate in your county's Adopt a Voter program! On Saturday we will share with you a graphic of information and a link to sign up and share on your social media accounts asking your friends and fellow Democrats to do the same! When you sign up via the link, your information will be sent to your local County Chair/Committee!

2. Commit to registering 5 or 10 new Democratic voters online from Saturday until the next Digital Day of Action!

3. Encourage Democrats to check and update their registration address and information! This will ensure they get their Absentee Ballot Requests and Ballots!

4. Simply share our graphics posted on Saturday on your social media accounts! They will include important information about Absentee Voting, registering to vote, and important information and changes for 2o20!

We are all in this together and we need to all do our part in ensuring an honest and fair election process in West Virginia!

We can do this together and doing so will ensure our message and important information reaches Democrats across the state!

We will be in touch soon!

-- Team WVDP

Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.

West Virginia Democratic Party
PO Box 11926
Charleston , WV 25339
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/da2a395b-3a8a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/8bc114d8-3b8a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmMxMTRkOC0zYjhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hsd7CAyJur16XCIkXQtYcX_gTi-JnArIUxwG7ERQU04=&id=106970630&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

Here in Kansas and across the country, thousands of people have stepped up and joined Michelle De La Isla in this important fight because they know she's the different kind of leader Kansans need to lift up their voices in Congress.

But national Republicans see the grassroots support we have, and they're getting nervous. They're ready to call in their super PACs and spend whatever it takes to defeat Michelle and hold onto this seat, so we need your support if we're going to have the resources to fight back.

**[Will you join the thousands of supporters who have already stepped up and chip in before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17308340/190028139/94722860?gpsid=8_122_12610&refcode=em20_200429_eom3_fnd_gq_act__sh_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200429_eom3_fnd_gq_act__sh_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNThmNWU0ZS0zYzhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PcgTbCQbO7Lo9b3BiTX1TNCtbEj3E5hF-ftlsX9kJO0=)**

Look -- we have the momentum needed to win. The DCCC named our district one of the biggest battlegrounds of 2020, and last quarter we outraised the entire GOP field combined. But that puts a huge target on our back, and we need to ensure we have the resources to fight back against whatever comes our way.

This campaign is about fighting for everyday people, so we're relying on folks like you to step up and help ensure we have what it takes to win. Whether it's $10, $20, or $100, any amount you donate gets us one step closer to sending Michelle to Congress to fight for Kansans.

**[Chip in before our end-of-month deadline to show Michelle you have her back in this important fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17308341/190028140/94722860?gpsid=8_122_12610&refcode=em20_200429_eom3_fnd_gq_act__sh_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200429_eom3_fnd_gq_act__sh_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNThmNWU0ZS0zYzhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PcgTbCQbO7Lo9b3BiTX1TNCtbEj3E5hF-ftlsX9kJO0=)**

Stephanie

Campaign Manager

clean_body: Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team. Do you see your name on this list, friend? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Here in Kansas and across the country, thousands of people have stepped up and joined Michelle De La Isla in this important fight because they know she's the different kind of leader Kansans need to lift up their voices in Congress. But national Republicans see the grassroots support we have, and they're getting nervous. They're ready to call in their super PACs and spend whatever it takes to defeat Michelle and hold onto this seat, so we need your support if we're going to have the resources to fight back. = Look -- we have the momentum needed to win. The DCCC named our district one of the biggest battlegrounds of 2020, and last quarter we outraised the entire GOP field combined. But that puts a huge target on our back, and we need to ensure we have the resources to fight back against whatever comes our way. This campaign is about fighting for everyday people, so we're relying on folks like you to step up and help ensure we have what it takes to win. Whether it's $10, $20, or $100, any amount you donate gets us one step closer to sending Michelle to Congress to fight for Kansans. = Thanks, Stephanie Stephanie Houghton Campaign Manager Team Michelle Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can. = PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS Michelle for Kansas PO Box 67101 Topeka, KS 66667 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

#
Hello, fabulous Dani for Illinois volunteers!

I wanted to remind you that today at noon we will be having a volunteer appreciation call! **The dial-in number for the call is 253-993-3246.**

We are looking forward to chatting with all of you, showing our appreciation, and giving you an update on the campaign.

**Oh! I almost forgot. There will be a special guest on the call today. Stay tuned :)**

Thank you for all you do to help our campaign. When we flip this seat blue in November it will be because of all of you and the tremendous work you have put in.

Dave McCarver
Campaign Manager

name: Kathy Landing for Congress

body:
| | | | The ad focuses on my unique qualifications to help President Trump restore stability, including my 35-year career as a financial planner. It also takes a shot at incumbent Democrat Joe Cunningham...
---
---
Email not displaying correctly? [View it](https://sg-mktg._tHUP710Qe0Kg==) in your browser.
---
Dear Friends, I am excited to share that **our campaign launched a new television ad** yesterday! The ad focuses on my unique qualifications to help President Trump restore stability, including my 35-year career as a financial planner. It also highlights that grandstanding and political stunts are not the answers to solving the problems we face. _I would love to know what you think of the new ad. Watch it now by clicking on the image below._
---
[](https://u10736622.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=1AWnnx1cmgNc12r02Nab4KbJYijOCQqmazJM7VLZks25kCJMYEKcmc6Rt8obaQcuyzgYAEJUUw4WYK0DLHFGIOjJf4O1cm3UmKJKKSaJGK4-3Dq6ht_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2Brrley4L5h37OHrLKB1q1AlMO8Vfr33vLs5R3UApbGvqm4ZDmE7Qeidms0NytpHZZT2OjdGW80phkS7tOH0XrEKDvqh5E1rFaySltUnkRLhggPolb6LYcac9Uk4gZwAFnkNtexIvXZ-2BNELpNUqefPxuHxFmbwTMQBroD0f5dZB7XDol70ayGExUOsPWU3LzRFT2ylzkNkuIekVCNBc9z-2B55Ov6k795V7DbOGKTPlAKlPR0Jpd6FKbkfxfKvEiDnsAtMR047WQxMw8aATm-2BTEufVI9RRySzWkh-2BTAOljsW45Zkrmi3RXDdF1f-2FLR2Sy1QzXqsr9Wzw7dW46Y0NZqWL5l2-2F6cF1VN9wDCCVQrlhot4oUpUvIQ5VRBNGrDOHSwzoPWO)

will be that Member of Congress, focused exclusively on getting the job done and representing you, not on self-promotion or political stunts.** That is why I am asking for your support today. _[< < clean_body: | | | | The ad focuses on my unique qualifications to help President Trump restore stability, including my 35-year career as a financial planner. It also takes a shot at incumbent Democrat Joe Cunningham... Email not displaying correctly? == in your browser. Dear Friends, I am excited to share that our campaign launched a new television ad yesterday! The ad focuses on my unique qualifications to help President Trump restore stability, including my 35-year career as a financial planner. It also highlights that grandstanding and political stunts are not the answers to solving the problems we face. I would love to know what you think of the new ad. Watch it now by clicking on the image below. It is absolutely critical to have Members of Congress with the education, experience, and expertise to restore the economy and bring back jobs because there will be no second chance to get this right. Restoring our economic greatness and ensuring we regain the strongest workforce in the world again can happen, but it will require adults in Congress committed to working with President Trump. I will be that Member of Congress, focused exclusively on getting the job done and representing you, not on self-promotion or political stunts. That is why I am asking for your support today. Your support means the world to me. Together, we will win this seat back for conservatives, families, and sensible solutions. On to Victory!! | Kathy Landing Conservative Republican for Congress | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " ---|--- | | Kathy Landing for Congress PO Box 31338 Charleston, SC 29417 | =

name: Sara 2020
subject: First, a new poll showed Sara Gideon in the lead over Susan Collins. Then Mitch McConnell booked $33 million in ads to maintain his Senate Majority! Now, we're asking you to chip in so we can fight back.
body:
They know Collins needs to win in Maine if Republicans are going to maintain their Senate majority.

**FIRST:** A poll showed Sara Gideon leading Susan Collins by **4 points!**
**THEN:** Mitch McConnell and the NRSC booked **_$33 million_ in ads **to support Republican Senate candidates -- and Susan Collins is on the top of their list.
They know Collins needs to win in Maine if Republicans are going to maintain their Senate majority.
**NOW: It 's critically important that we move quickly to set the record straight with Maine voters. That's why we have to ask: **
[**Can we count on you to make a contribution now so we have the resources we need to fight back against Mitch McConnell 's ads? Any amount you can afford makes a big difference.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658028eb/4bef7a87/6c07d300/287e48cb/2481902238/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDA0MjktMS10MiJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-april-2020?refcode=em200429-1-t2")
This is important. How we respond in this moment (as well as how quickly we respond) will determine how the rest of this campaign plays out. So hopefully we can count on you now.
All our best,
Team Gideon
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658028eb/4bef7a87/6c07d300/287e48cb/2481902238/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDA0MjktMS10MiJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-april-2020?refcode=em200429-1-t2")**********

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658028eb/4bef7a87/6c07d300/287e48ca/2481902238/VEsF/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658028eb/4bef7a87/6c07d300/287e48c9/2481902238/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/658028eb/4bef7a87/6c07d300/287e48c8/2481902238/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Team Marsha
subject: On Thursday...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
The most recent fundraising reports show that Republicans are being outraised by Democrats, who are relying on their deep-pocketed coastal elite donors to fund their efforts to steal our Senate Majority and replace President Trump.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/BlackburnSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=42383368&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTc0MzAxNzgwOQS2&spReportId=MTc0MzAxNzgwOQS2)
****
****
__
... We're up against our April fundraising deadline, and conservatives are at risk.

**The most recent fundraising reports show that Republicans are being outraised by Democrats, who are relying on their deep-pocketed coastal elite donors to fund their efforts to steal our Senate Majority and replace President Trump.**

These are the same Democrats who have prioritized their political games above the American people without fail.

The same Democrats, who, led by Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer, have repeatedly pushed their socialist wish list, stalling the delivery of relief for small businesses and preventing employees from being kept on payroll and receiving their benefits.

The same Democrats who plan to launch another sham investigation and witch hunt into President Trump's coronavirus response, a clear denial and distraction from who we really need to hold accountable -- China.

_We 've seen the warning signs since President Trump took office in 2016_: over these past four years, the Left has tried every trick in the book to hinder the Republican agenda, and they're building up massive war chests to do so.

With our deadline and the end of the month quickly approaching, Senator Marsha Blackburn needs your help to take on the Left and defend the Senate Majority.

_**Can we count on you to make a contribution before the April 30 deadline?**_

[**CHIP IN $100**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzODMzNjgS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzAxNzgwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[**CHIP IN $50**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzODMzNjgS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzAxNzgwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[**CHIP IN $25**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzODMzNjgS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzAxNzgwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[**CHIP IN $10**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzODMzNjgS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzAxNzgwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[**CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzODMzNjgS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzAxNzgwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

This coming election will be the toughest one we will see for a long time to come. Democrats will continue to spew hate and slander our nation's president. They will pull out all the stops to ensure President Trump is removed from office.

**Help President Trump and Senate Republicans defend our conservative agenda and maintain control of the White House and Senate by making a contribution before our April deadline!**

****Together, we can stand strong against the Left and say enough is enough! ****

[**CHIP IN**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzODMzNjgS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzAxNzgwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and
Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account.

name: Team Hicks
subject: RE: Help us enact some real change in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
As we prepare to close out April, we are closer than ever to closing the gap between Andy Barr’s dark-money machine and our own grassroots fundraising. Can you chip in now?

Hi team! We just wanted to circle back on Josh’s email from the other day. We’re only one day away from the end of the month, and we need to make sure we’re prepared to keep building this movement in May with our digital outreach campaign. **Our team is closer than ever to closing the gap between our grassroots fundraising and the Andy Barr, Mitch McConnell, dark-money machine. clean_body: We have a real shot at defeating Mitch McConnell, but if we don’t hit our April fundraising goal tomorrow night, that can severely hurt our momentum. We’ll cut straight to the chase. We have a huge fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight and we could really use your help to hit our 500 grassroots donations goal. We’re getting a little nervous. The numbers aren’t quite where we need them to be yet, but if everyone reading this email chips in even just $4.80 it’d be a huge help in making sure we hit our goal. = **= = The urgency to beat Mitch McConnell has never been higher before. We’re in the middle of a global pandemic. Our Senate Majority Leader and his colleagues are shamelessly fighting for a bailout for their billionaire friends in the fossil fuel industry. Meanwhile, nurses are dying on the frontlines and millions of families are figuring out how they’re going to put food on the table now that they’ve lost their only source of income. Our Republican Senate refuses to pass universal health care. Folks are infuriated. We’re infuriated. It’s clearer than ever that Mitch doesn’t work for us. And that anger is now fueling a progressive revolution that’s rising in Kentucky. But if we want to make sure this anger is channeled into real action this election, we need to step up and take this campaign to the next level in the weeks ahead. = = Hurry, Team Booker =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Right now, our campaign is working to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot in November -- without holding a single closed-door fundraiser. And it's all thanks to grassroots donors. But now... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e1/45c30650/1cad1d875/66e90040/1583307764/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Right now, our campaign is working to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot in November -- without holding a single closed-door fundraiser.

And it's all thanks to grassroots donors.

But now, we're facing the first end-of-month fundraising deadline for this quarter's FEC reporting period tomorrow at midnight. After the deadline, we'll only have two more months to hit our fundraising goal.

**So, we 'll get to it: We want these fundraising numbers to be as strong as possible. But right now, we're behind where we want to be to hit our goal.

[What happens between now and tomorrow night is powerfully important -- and every bit counts. If you are in a place to donate, can you chip in $2 or whatever you can before tomorrow's fundraising deadline to help power Elizabeth and Warren Democrats?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e1/45c30650/1cad1d875/66e90043/1583307764/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1hcHIyMGZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyNkZfRU9NX0dSTV9DXzIwMjAwNDI5X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-apr20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ26F_EOM_GRM_C_20200429_V1S1_P")**

We're not going to beat Donald Trump and down-ballot Republicans by backing down -- we'll beat them by fighting back.

We fight back when we build a grassroots movement -- a movement that doesn't take money from fossil fuel giants, big banks, or Big Pharma.

We fight back when we call out corruption in Washington and have Democrats up and down the ballot advocating for the biggest anti-corruption platform since Watergate.

We're asking for your help today to keep powering this fight. With your help, we can hit our goal before tomorrow's fundraising deadline and keep growing this grassroots movement.

**[If you can during this time, please make a contribution before tomorrow's fundraising deadline -- we'd be deeply grateful.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e1/45c30650/1cad1d875/66e90043/1583307764/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1hcHIyMGZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyNkZfRU9NX0dSTV9DXzIwMjAwNDI5X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-apr20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ26F_EOM_GRM_C_20200429_V1S1_P")**

Thanks,

Warren Democrats

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: ALERT: Texas Conservatives
body:
Friend, Newt Gingrich here with an important message. I hope you will read carefully.
I've been in politics for a long time. I thought I had seen it all.
Well, Friend, if this month's events are proof of anything, it's that you can NEVER truly see it all...
Our nation is at war with a deadly virus. President Trump is doing everything in his power to combat it. And amid it all, leftist politicians, pundits and groups are attacking him.
Rather than using this as an opportunity to come together, Liberals are still more concerned with dividing us, and raising gobs of cash to crush our conservative values in November including in Texas.
Right now, Senator Cornyn is facing his biggest End of Month goal yet one that if he misses, could spell the end for a Red Texas. That's why I'm reaching out to you for help.
But to tell you the truth, this is much bigger than Senator Cornyn. Even bigger than Texas. This is about preserving the Senate majority and ensuring our values aren't ERASED.
**[I'm asking you to do your part, as a proud conservative, to help him counter the liberal advances, and preserve our values in the Lone Star State. Can you chip in $25 now?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PDskjJ0Cg6Pt_7kc03Qo1wBzXbPDG0Kyan0uMZ0PzEdttxA7aEo1cikOGG41F7W6IwtZ3zGosn8IJHoNUWZKw609nPJxzk9PPylWhHjeGh9CxZn0qlM097c7IWaIXaEPvClfTNsXjJHs5offISLNLnIMLTPIsDVerGP-n6S-iC7coHvjmlbw96Uu3FkJi-nKXaHLghGARKypibbq2KAPpdqBomXhl0XbvQzqftdYdnUoh0_JV-XUeSUUMwbh6XsvgNiiFAR4lpdUh0HKHTLTvztPUfXyzKhAM6qQS3nulaApzmd6Dzmc8bq0v-qRpucRFih8tZgMCNVmFS9q3CrTpYNyYnU5FDPx&c=YW6ks9vsaLkwHswEA0-2BCXyBqyNX3E2gyeuZb-FRfBrQPRHiyo4Zg==&ch=sbXt8cDvxpOa5NF8GNRYFFOPCd6cPLAQEwTgo37L57QrwmJX3JYhug==)** **April Fundraising Deadline** Double Match: **ACTIVATED** [ **CONTRIBUTE** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PDskjJ0Cg6Pt_7kc03Qo1wBzXbPDG0Kyan0uMZ0PzEdttxA7aEo1cikOGG41F7W6IwtZ3zGosn8IJHoNUWZKw609nPJxzk9PPylWhHjeGh9CxZn0qlM097c7IWaIXaEPvClfTNsXjJHs5offISLNLnIMLTPIsDVerGP-n6S-iC7coHvjmlbw96Uu3FkJi-nKXaHLghGARKypibbq2KAPpdqBomXhl0XbvQzqftdYdnUoh0_JV-XUeSUUMwbh6XsvgNiiFAR4lpdUh0HKHTLTvztPUfXyzKhAM6qQS3nulaApzmd6Dzmc8bq0v-qRpucRFih8tZgMCNVmFS9q3CrTpbZj2i-lWgfL&c=YW6ks9vsaLkwHswEA0-2BCXyBqyNX3E2gyeuZb-FRfBrQPRHiyo4Zg==&ch=sbXt8cDvxpOa5NF8GNRYFFOPCd6cPLAQEwTgo37L57QrwmJX3JYhug==) Senator Cornyn has said that every dollar raised from this month's End of Month push will go directly to:
SUPPORTING our president and his efforts to keep our nation safe and healthy.
FIGHTING the liberal obstructionist agenda.
PRESERVING conservative values and Keeping Texas RED. [ **STAND WITH JOHN CORNYN** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PDskjJ0Cg6Pt_7kc03Qo1wBzXbPDG0Kyan0uMZ0PzEdttxA7aEo1cikOGG41F7W6IwtZ3zGosn8IJHoNUWZKw609nPJxzk9PPylWhHjeGh9CxZn0qlM097c7IWaIXaEPvClfTNsXjJHs5offISLNLnIMLTPIsDVerGP-n6S-iC7coHvjmlbw96Uu3FkJi-nKXaHLghGARKypibbq2KAPpdqBomXhl0XbvQzqftdYdnUoh0_JV-XUeSUUMwbh6XsvgNiiFAR4lpdUh0HKHTLTvztPUfXyzKhAM6qQS3nulaApzmd6Dzmc8bq0v-qRpucRFih8tZgMCNVmFS9q3CrTpcDjDmw7-RAZ&c=YW6ks9vsaLkwHswEA0-2BCXyBqyNX3E2gyeuZb-FRfBrQPRHiyo4Zg==&ch=sbXt8cDvxpOa5NF8GNRYFFOPCd6cPLAQEwTgo37L57QrwmJX3JYhug==)
Friend, I need you to be quick here.
Every minute wasted is another leg up for the radical left.
They're coming for our president. For our Texas senator. And for our values.
**[We can't afford to lose any time- I need you to join Senator Cornyn right now by chipping in to help him meet this massive goal.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PDskjJ0Cg6Pt_7kc03Qo1wBzXbPDG0Kyan0uMZ0PzEdttxA7aEo1cikOGG41F7W6IwtZ3zGosn8IJHoNUWZKw609nPJxzk9PPylWhHjeGh9CxZn0qlM097c7IWaIXaEPvClfTNsXjJHs5offISLNLnIMLTPIsDVerGP-n6S-iC7coHvjmlbw96Uu3FkJi-nKXaHLghGARKypibbq2KAPpdqBomXhl0XbvQzqftdYdnUoh0_JV-XUeSUUMwbh6XsvgNiiFAR4lpdUh0HKHTLTvztPUfXyzKhAM6qQS3nulaApzmd6Dzmc8bq0v-qRpucRFih8tZgMCNVmFS9q3CrTpR46D6yq36Q8&c=YW6ks9vsaLkwHswEA0-2BCXyBqyNX3E2gyeuZb-FRfBrQPRHiyo4Zg==&ch=sbXt8cDvxpOa5NF8GNRYFFOPCd6cPLAQEwTgo37L57QrwmJX3JYhug==)**
-Newt Gingrich
**[P.S. I'm told this will be a DOUBLE MATCH opportunity. If you chip in $50, it will count as $150!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PDskjJ0Cg6Pt_7kc03Qo1wBzXbPDG0Kyan0uMZ0PzEdttxA7aEo1cikOGG41F7W6IwtZ3zGosn8IJHoNUWZKw609nPJxzk9PPylWhHjeGh9CxZn0qlM097c7IWaIXaEPvClfTNsXjJHs5offISLNLnIMLTPIsDVerGP-n6S-iC7coHvjmlbw96Uu3FkJi-nKXaHLghGARKypibbq2KAPpdqBomXhl0XbvQzqftdYdnUoh0_JV-XUeSUUMwbh6XsvgNiiFAR4lpdUh0HKHTLTvztPUfXyzKhAM6qQS3nulaApzmd6Dzmc8bq0v-qRpucRFih8tZgMCNVmFS9q3CrTpfg9o8bVqOGD&c=YW6ks9vsaLkwHswEA0-2BCXyBqyNX3E2gyeuZb-FRfBrQPRHiyo4Zg==&ch=sbXt8cDvxpOa5NF8GNRYFFOPCd6cPLAQEwTgo37L57QrwmJX3JYhug==)** Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PDskjJ0Cg6Pt_7kc03Qo1wBzXbPDG0Kyan0uMZ0PzEdttxA7aEo1cuTWzSbFzAqRptYKYzhOSbkfrkggASKZFOnf2RfXYHH98lYrG_K-_cOsmBKWU_nE2T_OWbcjWEEbUVMNxTzjLjPec5cfIpH5QNNPTpLLVXmYqowlLdynaRY=&c=YW6ks9vsaLkwHswEA0-2BCXyBqyNX3E2gyeuZb-FRfBrQPRHiyo4Zg==&ch=sbXt8cDvxpOa5NF8GNRYFFOPCd6cPLAQEwTgo37L57QrwmJX3JYhug==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PDskjJ0Cg6Pt_7kc03Qo1wBzXbPDG0Kyan0uMZ0PzEdttxA7aEo1cqEzwaMqs6zMrTDCDVMmk0o2Wowmr30VBp8X50egL2DViuIh0QXy_cbyeltXGd87hIiEuxPE9O8TRcWfN1ehHSrK-qr3_3Ujaz9KR_PVy88A&c=YW6ks9vsaLkwHswEA0-2BCXyBqyNX3E2gyeuZb-FRfBrQPRHiyo4Zg==&ch=sbXt8cDvxpOa5NF8GNRYFFOPCd6cPLAQEwTgo37L57QrwmJX3JYhug==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PDskjJ0Cg6Pt_7kc03Qo1wBzXbPDG0Kyan0uMZ0PzEdttxA7aEo1cuTWzSbFzAqRJVkMApY5t5um3JzrjABhITJQU-GjU2_Sj4XAtWaCQg9leJxUcJPDdduZyKPGdF5R-vIaFMu-fG0DByzYDbJ626h8IPdzHzB35yh_1T8LlX7g6VbeYCc4SA==&c=YW6ks9vsaLkwHswEA0-2BCXyBqyNX3E2gyeuZb-FRfBrQPRHiyo4Zg==&ch=sbXt8cDvxpOa5NF8GNRYFFOPCd6cPLAQEwTgo37L57QrwmJX3JYhug==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. clean_body: Friend, Newt Gingrich here with an important message. I hope you will read carefully. I've been in politics for a long time. I thought I had seen it all. Well, Friend, if this month's events are proof of anything, it's that you can NEVER truly see it all... Our nation is at war with a deadly virus. President Trump is doing everything in his power to combat it. And amid it all, leftist politicians, pundits and groups are attacking him. Rather than using this as an opportunity to come together, Liberals are still more concerned with dividing us, and raising gobs of cash to crush our conservative values in November including in Texas. Right now, Senator Cornyn is facing his biggest End of Month goal yet one that if he misses, could spell the end for a Red Texas. That's why I'm reaching out to you for help. But to tell you the truth, this is much bigger than Senator Cornyn. Even bigger than Texas. This is about preserving the Senate majority and ensuring our values aren't ERASED. == April Fundraising Deadline Double Match: ACTIVATED == Senator Cornyn has said that every dollar raised from this month's End of Month push will go directly to: SUPPORTING our president and his efforts to keep our nation safe and healthy. FIGHTING the liberal obstructionist agenda. PRESERVING conservative values and Keeping Texas RED. == Friend, I need you to be quick here. Every minute wasted is another leg up for the radical left. They're coming for our president. For our Texas senator. And for our values. == -Newt Gingrich == Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. body:
Democrats are closing in our battleground Senate race here in Colorado, where Senator Cory Gardner is facing far-Left challengers, including Schumer's hand-picked candidate, failed presidential candidate John Hickenlooper.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Atc8HKM2lJRUNIzxOErDsoEm5tBKiAo5AN_ZSL6ox5oSAP7_d0FlxDDgq-UD5BaNqagzd61YPc5spQToQCJ9Ak6x7pVwKDVlD0wmKE_t_H1EAGb__eRsrMFIzcCqT12q5JHuk0D4HNc19xubyG_VVmjDUZvWHaqwknSKj7Wh3fQgygeqczYY9mmhz1csUJ7ZI4QGMgalS38w36OjNpOmXg3z9JDZS23CbWyBglaGcf2XzJF-NvY3sM32ZdvfaOTjEBImPAkRmPOjHhPYcUijOa-kOf0NlGlmmw41rCkgLYayCstNNCSyumLZnIY_PK9N02a94weleV-kJ3_m5qInOfru-sjPVQ-RpF0vI2krTEZZq0p6v2oYrCvJ61xHJkkHjsgnvLowwpFWxxcv4OEfWUoWddzfngdkljiYuVznpBM=&c=88m-lXQU6D0S1e8PAVzkDdFEt-5BOwJomiGktL-j1wzQUfsiWzCWFA==&ch=e5fl0oxY9wcg-dSxcmolmZEvQhGlxNUh2tArZHfDXnHfGZmb90JCUw==)

Friend,

Democrats are closing in our battleground Senate race here in Colorado, where Senator Cory Gardner is facing far-Left challengers, **including Schumer 's hand-picked candidate, failed presidential candidate John Hickenlooper.**

Right now, Cory's seat is fair game as far as Schumer is concerned, meaning that Colorado could fall into the hands of the far-Left if we don't act quickly.

body:

name: Matt Gaze
subject: Follow up on Sri’s email to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Hi Team -

Sri reached out to you earlier this week to explain the importance of our April fundraising goal, and as his finance director, I thought it would be a good time to follow up.

**As it stands, we 're currently $3,294 away from hitting our online April goal.**

**If we can get at least 60 more people to step up by the end of _today_ with a donation of $27 dollars -- we'll be back on track to hit this goal by the end of this month.**

What do you say, friend? Can Sri count on you to help us bring True Representation to TX-22?

Here's the link again [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WzZn6NtWze7QceTw8jpX8oZJWv9SFSjYQ0kxKlPe0RA=/Ln4DCEokiZlFO7r2uzYsIi0nnlETnN0Ku9AgJ0zpajM=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.29_MG_b1_all&amount=27)

Fighting alongside you,
Matt

On Mon, Apr 27, 2020 at 4:08 PM **Sri Preston Kulkarni** wrote:
With just a couple days left of the month, I'm sure your inbox is being flooded with the usual "end-of-month" email solicitations.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/WzZn6NtWze7QceTw8jpX8oZJWv9SFSjYQ0kxKlPe0RA=/Ln4DCEokiZlFO7r2uzYsIi0nnlETnN0Ku9AgJ0zpajM=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.29_MG_b1_all&amount=22)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hopes you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/WzZn6NtWze7QceTw8jpX8oZJWv9SFSjYQ0kxKlPe0RA=/CGucOTPY-JNr8BTyUB6xfd6RfRKTvhBVlHGPVqBIuGc=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

Team -

With just a couple days left of the month, I'm sure your inbox is being flooded with the usual "end-of-month" email solicitations.

One thing I've noticed about these emails in my own inbox is that despite their urgent fundraising asks -- they rarely take the time to explain what these fundraising goals actually mean.

Speaking for my own campaign, here's what I can tell you about our "end-of-month deadline."

Between now and the end of April, our campaign will work to get as many donations as we can through the door so we can enter May with the budget and resources we'll need to fulfill the new month's agenda.

For us that will mean expanding our community outreach programs to better serve our district amidst the COVID-19 pandemic, building out our digital organizing program to keep our volunteers engaged at a responsible distance, and funding our traditional campaign efforts to help us flip this seat in November.

We know this is a tall order, but our campaign team is ready to take it on and never shied away from doing the hard and meaningful work. **Anything that you 're able to give to help us fulfill these goals would make a huge difference.**

Donate here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WzZn6NtWze7QceTw8jpX8oZJWv9SFSjYQ0kxKlPe0RA=/Ln4DCEokiZlFO7r2uzYsIi0nnlETnN0Ku9AgJ0zpajM=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.29_MG_b1_all&amount=22)

Thanks for being on our team,
Sri
---
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/WzZn6NtWze7QceTw8jpX8oZJWv9SFSjYQ0kxKlPe0RA=/Ln4DCEokiZlFO7r2uzYsIi0nnlETnN0Ku9AgJ0zpajM=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.29_MG_b1_all&amount=22)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/WzZn6NtWze7QceTw8jpX8oZJWv9SFSjYQ0kxKlPe0RA=/Ln4DCEokiZlFO7r2uzYsIi0nnlETnN0Ku9AgJ0zpajM=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.29_MG_b1_all&amount=22)
---
* * *
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at [sri2020.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/WzZn6NtWze7QceTw8jpX8oZJWv9SFSjYQ0kxKlPe0RA=/yWcH_4YFyrUf-TluW5RsVoHgQKq14sYek6SMT-yRYic=)
| Paid for by Sri for Congress
---

P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898

Elections should be decided by voters, not deep-pocketed special interest groups trying to push their own agenda.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17311092/190071074/460726911?amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2020.04.29_b1_nv_all-nd&refcode2=7ccd475d-4d8a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2NkNDc1ZC00ZDhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g5IbjfeTA6R2_36kkp-XEwd6_OO81ORtah5EhcEanAY=) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Team,

**Earlier this month, we told you about the massive investments that Republican special interests are pouring into races like ours across the country.** These super PACs and special interest groups are dedicating _millions of dollars_ to keep Pennsylvania red -- and that includes propping up Scott Perry right here in PA-10.

But, team, the truth is, they’re investing huge sums of money because they’re _terrified_ of the grassroots movement we’ve built here in South Central Pennsylvania --_they know we have what it takes to win._ **[As of right now, we’re $6,122 away from meeting our April fundraising goal. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Zoom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#

body:
There’s a lot we can do on this campaign. We can have dozens of volunteers make thousands of calls a week to voters. We can send tens of thousands of texts letting people know about Mondaire. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DAE/ni0YAA/t.31c/Zgu2tNASSLG0blBarjY-xA/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKzt5V9SWKELsp0WGTxKFkXERy0QMI2vs8bkiVyWi22TBZZY8NnnTzdwUdFAvqpQhIwUP4C3Wdt-2FKTy4TPtbDEUnHFiVzik6B7FU3dMgwjZ4ZA-2BYG3C-2B1AjCmLPTH3X3ully0VhP9uvFlaPCFklOxyXBIuH7-2FyzJd03jTPt4m0XU1exj7D2GLw0gBZQVzsUxIWZriDXXEr6NRe5r4LEyG4KQzpNH-2BS-2F53-2BfT3I8zSgNYldl6FSkiHaSDPByKZxO1KAUhi9UOy2k5NKWO7tRBqC9/usCN) Friend, There’s a lot we can do on this campaign. We can have dozens of volunteers make thousands of calls a week to voters. We can send tens of thousands of texts letting people know about Mondaire. We can get dozens of people to attend virtual meet and greets to hear from Mondaire directly.
But one thing we can’t do is call on corporate PACs or fossil fuel lobbyists when we’re coming up short on our fundraising goals. We don’t think Representatives can effectively fight for the interests of their constituents when their campaigns are bankrolled by big pharma, the defense lobby, and the fossil fuel industry. That’s why Mondaire made a pledge not to take money from any of those sources, **_ever_**.
Our campaign is still short of our monthly fundraising goal. We’re asking our grassroots donors for support to help get us to where we need to be. A typical corporate PAC check might be $5,000. **_[Can you make a donation today to help us raise $2,500 with this email and show our grassroots strength?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DAE/ni0YAA/t.31c/Zgu2tNASSLG0blBarjY-xA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKzt5V9SWKELsp0WGTxKFkXERy0QMI2vs8bkiVyWi22TDq3UisOs8ehRp6jAT6Yf41Or5q5PtJpjix9FbEqX6SReDkI617qz93i8MstdT7jH7WaizlQ45BhMht3mK0Mk6brHOLf2DTxBYK-2BTRk-2F8usOWT6XWJlbrpS2OXt1A3KRP7SVUTwdY07pFO6tuqDI3qnDu1MklpsnHNbo-2BLruwtFD7MK2fVVHbViPj7CdYudyoQ0WuHsJ17YMUd2Iw7IX2RMkBF19Gx6ZKMlLA9-2F-2Fk5G0/PuPr)_**
When Mondaire gets elected to Congress, there won’t be any fossil fuel lobbyists or corporations coming to his door to call in favors. That’s because our movement is powered by thousands of people all across our district and all throughout the country, not by special interests. **_[Will you make a contribution today to support our people-powered movement?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DAE/ni0YAA/t.31c/Zgu2tNASSLG0blBarjY-xA/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKzt5V9SWKELsp0WGTxKFkXERy0QMI2vs8bkiVyWi22TMAFIsFPDGBnE0Nb-2BktTlAQS2K1rE8iO-2FFFOnrEUyKoUX0LJY5Vk-2FYZ6hrtdx7DjrjgOfjvOCSmKvfqqsq-2FchtPpfMRxQ7uTEIwgRJIh1rbDfVKEly1QAkzPMhkXuHucKxfYtNJqz8YTfeZntDjjNiH3QN5HzPO2zsvJOSl8NBSuPKFdX6qTl5B7SL4Scl7zPLT5NwH61VZI4gZF3Ea4rzNkdHx1gfYW-2Bkmt4T1U-2FRzJ/rGhX)_**
