We don’t think Representatives can effectively fight for the interests of their constituents when their campaigns are bankrolled by big pharma, the defense lobby, and the fossil fuel industry. That’s why Mondaire made a pledge not to take money from any of those sources, ever. Our campaign is still short of our monthly fundraising goal. We’re asking our grassroots donors for support to help get us to where we need to be. A typical corporate PAC check might be $5,000. When Mondaire gets elected to Congress, there won’t be any fossil fuel lobbyists or corporations coming to his door to call in favors. That’s because our movement is powered by thousands of people all across our district and all throughout the country, not by special interests. Team Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Showcases Jobs Preserved by Paycheck Protection Program Amid COVID-19 Shutdown
body:
“‘I love my job, and I am excited about going back to work,’” Heup, a disabled employee, said at the East Room event.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dd02582912&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Showcases Jobs Preserved by Paycheck Protection Program Amid COVID-19 Shutdown**

“Michael Heup not only got his job back at Bitty & Beau’s Coffee, which was temporarily closed because of the COVID-19 crisis, but he also had the chance to talk about it at the White House on Tuesday,” Fred Lucas reports for _The Daily Signal_.

“‘I love my job, and I am excited about going back to work,’ Heup, a disabled employee, said at the East Room event.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6a6260ee3a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “We can’t wait months. We must protect the vulnerable and mitigate without destroying the economy. Standing up to this virus can’t be the job of essential workers only. We’ve been strong, but we’re tired, and we need the rest of you to help us. By getting back to work,” writes Bronx emergency physician Daniel G. Murphy for the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2368d2c89a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump signed a new executive order last night to “address questions in the food supply chain that have arisen during the coronavirus pandemic.” The order, leveraging the Defense Production Act, treats meat processing plants as part of our critical infrastructure, Christian Datoc reports in [_**The Daily Caller**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=713419621b&e=3ee4985eea "https://dailycaller.com/2020/04/28/trump-sign-executive-order-meat-processing-plants-coronavirus-covid-19/").
---
|
---
| “New York’s [Coronavirus] response has been compared unfavorably to Seattle’s and to California’s.” New York City Mayor Bill de Blasio “clashed with his public health advisers, spent early March telling New Yorkers to get out and go about their lives, promised the subways were safe, and encouraged residents to make one last visit to their local watering holes hours before ordering them closed,” [_Politico_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=988ae2a18a&e=3ee4985eea) writes.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=31ce2ed1d8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2c70cc2b3e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=dd7ee29900)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
We have less than 48 hours left.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QDO4u157HItDC11r_L_iuB76pXoslj6q27eK2fl0KF71XUlKaIWBbIi5YGtSuYP8ElP4VKFtychihrWIFosVo2SO2FTu1Hrrd_Mpp4AbZpaELCHwmPWhtK5_vu75wGC5bccF9WxCfw4P-Csqv_6Vg8GqUxZSD0NRxU9PR589F4wRB0YS_rokYM58GuL3G8tFT7Ta5240eKKTBjx7icz9HNaiUCN4n59zjG0yn7kQBmvlCa6f3O_rZVvR-XxyT-qA8v5UNNJKTHcGgtkZpWiX1TqZu2N_J6hyLmIhY_iBe3HH1OLyW4KHvO2SBeftwqPNPfRaGOiumuYhBQQckxmUU4cb6tdeseD4_7RX9m79u9fRBemDzoZCJQ==&c=ljvDltjC7VW-_umXuwRG89QqM6zJV5T5d2u_XDYuMq323cUFx5ss1g==&ch=NPCbtj19zW6iYWDoPAmetbs4Nt5XrxKGRg9A2d_z3vOjzcqd8oXvQA==)
**$927,000.00** \-- how much our liberal opponent raised last quarter.
**$4,000,000.00+** \-- how much Michael Bloomberg spent to buy this seat in 2018.
**$7,848.00** \-- how much we need to raise by 11:59PM tomorrow to stay in the fight.

That means if just 341 of our grassroots supporters chip in $23 (our average online donation) we'll be right where we need to be -- but as of right now, we're behind. [**Can we count on you to chip in $23, $5, or even just $1 right now to put us on the path to victory?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QDO4u157HItDC11r_L_iuB76pXoslj6q27eK2fl0KF71XUlKaIWBbIi5YGtSuYP8H2a419PuyQFzm-6bjRKPSOO1S6ErrbHAzh8WUW8hA0H1NO-NTmZW6Gl09s3cQ3d3wRwYf6LAWtHK_2yaqTUfTPDMfGoNuSmk7pMZt5W1BTC6TqrfbtUc7-axsDlsuR9IioikJQcyym-g4Fwj-4OWw3Svp9vrT6Frkv0jYO5x2bLxsBd3M8bTB_Gx5Rwz_O7H_hvpkKHtIk_CJbvOzLNH6icssw1DBDSpXQctv6DGEh40eqh6__XxwmF0-tMcI78YFFxbsv50SvUEdnZ-zqD1iND4rfV0F3VIW7HV163WLCdPdxSR8aB8CA==&c=ljvDltjC7VW-_umXuwRG89QqM6zJV5T5d2u_XDYuMq323cUFx5ss1g==&ch=NPCbtj19zW6iYWDoPAmetbs4Nt5XrxKGRg9A2d_z3vOjzcqd8oXvQA==)

**We have less than 48 hours until the next critical deadline of our campaign and 5X matching is ACTIVE until then**. Meeting our goal means we have the resources we need to take on our Bloomberg backed opponent in one of the top-targeted races in the nation. Falling short means we lose our chance to flip this seat RED and take back the House back for Republicans.

That's not a chance we're willing to take and that's why we're coming to you for help. This race is being billed as the "Marquee Fight" to watch in November and POLITICO is calling it a toss-up. It's going to be a fight to the finish and what we do right now will go a long way to determining November's outcome.

[**Can you rush in a donation ahead of tomorrow 's midnight deadline? All donations made before the deadline will have 5X the impact!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QDO4u157HItDC11r_L_iuB76pXoslj6q27eK2fl0KF71XUlKaIWBbIi5YGtSuYP8ElP4VKFtychihrWIFosVo2SO2FTu1Hrrd_Mpp4AbZpaELCHwmPWhtK5_vu75wGC5bccF9WxCfw4P-Csqv_6Vg8GqUxZSD0NRxU9PR589F4wRB0YS_rokYM58GuL3G8tFT7Ta5240eKKTBjx7icz9HNaiUCN4n59zjG0yn7kQBmvlCa6f3O_rZVvR-XxyT-qA8v5UNNJKTHcGgtkZpWiX1TqZu2N_J6hyLmIhY_iBe3HH1OLyW4KHvO2SBeftwqPNPfRaGOiumuYhBQQckxmUU4cb6tdeseD4_7RX9m79u9fRBemDzoZCJQ==&c=ljvDltjC7VW-_umXuwRG89QqM6zJV5T5d2u_XDYuMq323cUFx5ss1g==&ch=NPCbtj19zW6iYWDoPAmetbs4Nt5XrxKGRg9A2d_z3vOjzcqd8oXvQA==) These last few weeks we've had to move our entire fundraising operation online. Meaning we're relying more than ever on supporters like you and emails like this to stop the Democrats from buying this seat _again_.

Michelle Steel has dedicated her life to providing quick, common-sense reforms to all Californians. She's pledged to oppose new taxes and tax increases and even led the fight to return millions to California taxpayers. Now she's ready to take that fight to Congress -- but she needs our help!

That means if just 341 of our grassroots supporters chip in $23 (our average online donation) we'll be right where we need to be -- but as of right now, we're behind. == We have less than 48 hours until the next critical deadline of our campaign and 5X matching is ACTIVE until then. name: Senator Joni Ernst
subject: I can't stress how important this is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
Our next major fundraising deadline is tomorrow at midnight. I can't stress how important it is we meet our goal before time runs out.
**[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017nnuElb-U29vcdom8OscX9byPw9Our35VMJb1e7nI7efunAKkl4-Ma9-wal6povBMCDthCFWTvgD6WhfQ_bOg76yu5Ti_gxtYF7r90mYjNHq0lCrDWYYXh4ivscbeZUPjM31hu801CS99BIHLM-pQSjjDmfuzZ8Vi3SAj4nCm8j7TlfmkKbdgg7uH4Aff7-oGxzhR7vfgfTG5CStOwuv_ZSyf_1Juo2yLFJ8klQjRaFt74AqKW7QNsM4UJptiwcN2rUUdknV3Rk-QbABvDTCds3HM2Psv1X3X4O3YLrO_SPVfKmhk6t51ZW9vn5gdH0r-BhakltvqElBZB3lQeMx1J-Qb8i1IYu-&c=0RbS3U_kTXjdDi5_3ebAqxobCEiPDBNcj8zKcBgYuSvlvpkRN5UCtA==&ch=thQVf2i0JyqsSMqSQ38wHm7snb01dqy1mAXNJv7tFk6gnAlISxf5Kw==)**

**Our next major fundraising deadline is tomorrow at midnight.**

Friend, I can't stress how important it is we meet our goal before time runs out.

Just recently, Schumer's handpicked candidate broke fundraising records for a second time, Democrats launched $70 million in attacks across the country, and Chuck Schumer admitted himself that Iowa is his best chance at flipping the Senate Majority.

The stakes are higher than they have ever been. The only way to protect the Republican Senate Majority is to keep Iowa's Senate seat RED!

[**< CLICK HERE to rush in a donation of any size>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017nnuElb-U29vcdom8OscX9byPw9Our35VMJb1e7nI7efunAKkl4-Ma9-wal6povBMCDthCFWTvgD6WhfQ_bOg76yu5Ti_gxtYF7r90mYjNHq0lCrDWYYXh4ivscbeZUPjM31hu801CS99BIHLM-pQSjjDmfuzZ8Vi3SAj4nCm8j7TlfmkKbdgg7uH4Aff7-oGxzhR7vfgfTG5CStOwuv_ZSyf_1Juo2yLFJ8klQjRaFt74AqKW7QNsM4UJptiwcN2rUUdknV3Rk-QbABvDTCds3HM2Psv1X3X4O3YLrO_SPVfKmhk6t51ZW9vn5gdH0r-BhakltvqElBZB3lQeMx1J-Qb8i1IYu-&c=0RbS3U_kTXjdDi5_3ebAqxobCEiPDBNcj8zKcBgYuSvlvpkRN5UCtA==&ch=thQVf2i0JyqsSMqSQ38wHm7snb01dqy1mAXNJv7tFk6gnAlISxf5Kw==)

4X MATCH STATUS is active for our top grassroots donors:
**Grassroots Donor**
**4X Match Status: ACTIVE!**
**[Protect the Senate Majority](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017nnuElb-U29vcdom8OscX9byPw9Our35VMJb1e7nI7efunAKkl4-Ma9-wal6povBMCDthCFWTvgD6WhfQ_bOg76yu5Ti_gxtYF7r90mYjNHq0lCrDWYYXh4ivscbeZUPjM31hu801CS99BIHLM-pQSjjDmfuzZ8Vi3SAj4nCm8j7TlfmkKbdgg7uH4Aff7-oGxzhR7vfgfTG5CStOwuv_ZSyf_1Juo2yLFJ8klQjRaFt74AqKW7QNsM4UJptiwcN2rUUdknV3Rk-QbABvDTCds3HM2Psv1X3X4O3YLrO_SPVfKmhk6t51ZW9vn5gdH0r-BhakltvqElBZB3lQeMx1J-Qb8i1IYu-&c=0RbS3U_kTXjdDi5_3ebAqxobCEiPDBNcj8zKcBgYuSvlvpkRN5UCtA==&ch=thQVf2i0JyqsSMqSQ38wHm7snb01dqy1mAXNJv7tFk6gnAlISxf5Kw==)**

Schumer and his high-dollar donors have been pouring money into Iowa in support of their handpicked candidate at a record-breaking rate. We must fight back.

**Please take advantage of this last-chance opportunity to make your impact go 4X further and do your part to keep the Senate RED!**
**
[Donate HERE before tomorrow night's major deadline!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017nnuElb-U29vcdom8OscX9byPw9Our35VMJb1e7nI7efunAKkl4-Ma9-wal6povBMCDthCFWTvgD6WhfQ_bOg76yu5Ti_gxtYF7r90mYjNHq0lCrDWYYXh4ivscbeZUPjM31hu801CS99BIHLM-pQSjjDmfuzZ8Vi3SAj4nCm8j7TlfmkKbdgg7uH4Aff7-oGxzhR7vfgfTG5CStOwuv_ZSyf_1Juo2yLFJ8klQjRaFt74AqKW7QNsM4UJptiwcN2rUUdknV3Rk-QbABvDTCds3HM2Psv1X3X4O3YLrO_SPVfKmhk6t51ZW9vn5gdH0r-BhakltvqElBZB3lQeMx1J-Qb8i1IYu-&c=0RbS3U_kTXjdDi5_3ebAqxobCEiPDBNcj8zKcBgYuSvlvpkRN5UCtA==&ch=thQVf2i0JyqsSMqSQ38wHm7snb01dqy1mAXNJv7tFk6gnAlISxf5Kw==)**

Your support will help us fight back against Schumer's attempts to buy Iowa's Senate seat outright. We can't do it without support from our grassroots, so please, Friend, take action before it's too late.

Thank you for your continued support,
Joni Ernst

But with Mitch McConnell's Senate majority up for grabs, Republicans are pulling out all the stops to keep this seat red. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) - a former Wall Street executive - has now pledged to spend a staggering $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to buy this election. If Democrats can't counter that funding right now, we'll throw away our chance to flip this seat.
**That 's why this news couldn't have come at a better time:** **A group of generous donors just stepped up to MATCH every single grassroots donation, dollar for dollar, so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats!**
The GOP's megadonors will protect Mitch McConnell's Senate majority at all costs - so the ONLY way we can win is if grassroots donors like you take full advantage of our critical match opportunity.

body:
Democrats only need to capture FOUR seats to destroy President Trump's Senate Majority. My opponent has a huge cash advantage and is using it to drown out our conservative message. Time is running out - chip in to help us stop a leftist takeover in November!
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wQ-vat8MwmV9Sck-mg6EVbWlFTtyCItNzy0Dc96LsRR-KCsHq1dHcblViIO-Shybh89hL-GmkOScmP255QE2B_mM_15tc-8a9fAvrakg34yN6L4wWrf27QCI_oQQ1R4oftJHc48NHaN2nDhExGi9PpMYWUDo0n6e2eb_HkQqPEEf77ZiU4Fz61QOrROXHVaMLpEo0ChB4SOnKj-Ds-yj8SBWMNulJRpSOcWdgB284T6RDbmm2DVeN7r8XxNYqXl22Zf_UJcRHzb9DUWM5lvAps48ZwW7ISJwFTT5fajnmAPVHKYlnWTvSo9OeDBdhcojfvCtZw80lW8_lJFwtcQzsCwwKP-80P1_DHTzQfOKdW4UHj7Rq8D4cd2-PtI7Ykni46EkHuIpiZVOhqWzIJL3yg==&c=jI4yj1d_-5Bef-8rW-BAA8SYx-HDZEpe28UIfVf2otj6dayS-o2tQw==&ch=vAruyp9kQHutG7IwEgYYT5pC5ZWdWOl_gk47o7Poc9pCIdaxtwYxZQ==)
Friend,

This will be one of the most consequential elections of our lifetimes. Democrats, like my opponent, have embraced far-left Socialist policies that would change our country as we know it. **If Democrats flip Arizona and the Senate, there 's little that can be done to stop them from implementing dangerous policies like:**
* The Green New Deal
* Kicking 150 million Americans off their health care plans
* Loosening security of our Southern border
* And so much more...

Our End of Month deadline is **just 1 day away.** I'm asking you personally to pitch in immediately and help me stop the Socialist left from gaining any more ground. Don't forget that earlier this year, my fellow GOP colleagues were working to put Americans First while Democrats prioritized a flawed and rushed impeachment of our President. Then, just these last few weeks, Democrats blocked emergency relief funding for American workers, families and small business - not just once, but TWICE. All so they could leverage political wins for their far left agenda.

_**If I 've learned anything from watching them, Democrats should NEVER control the Senate! But they are coming frighteningly close with the help of the Liberal Establishment and their friends in the mainstream media.**_

Democrats only need to capture FOUR seats to destroy President Trump's Senate Majority. My opponent has a huge cash advantage and is using it to drown out our conservative message. [**Time is running out - chip in $25 or more and help us stop a leftist takeover in November!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wQ-vat8MwmV9Sck-mg6EVbWlFTtyCItNzy0Dc96LsRR-KCsHq1dHcblViIO-ShybwXa2PediwRrEk1rdstG80VS02pAkrdaC0PUGkc4mqR8_3lnLvon6CLhSBiB7Mx-enaY4f1nTxDeiWXE0WrDD9QdXmt2Rib-UVREANquCZhVDFIiOEd2GNhUH05AfpVDQ4mF90B4IW7bXzr6zpUreAKrlDOng7co2NvaXWA8geMft7FUUnt_hhNe1cAx3ayHhp9pRQ2nbZriCW5Mk9jnJFwt8PLOu3oIco-8X-KHCulqiiInSGY5CYh3WELsmGVTD3dWVv_yzxz2_MVYjJb1pEhP0KmilkSmp-qOMrFvIlu-w3vVTnUPnYipoi6FUjf566xR2HnipIKG8T2biCZGt0qFsvajXojqVV1MciF3_b4w=&c=jI4yj1d_-5Bef-8rW-BAA8SYx-HDZEpe28UIfVf2otj6dayS-o2tQw==&ch=vAruyp9kQHutG7IwEgYYT5pC5ZWdWOl_gk47o7Poc9pCIdaxtwYxZQ==)

Democrats have made it clear they will do whatever it takes to get President Trump and his allies out of office. They are spending millions to try to stop us, and their liberal base is mobilized and ready.

We only have 1 day left. I need to know if you're with me. name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: More Updates: Indiana Republican State Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
Your state committee today unanimously approved temporary rules that would allow for a convention’s appropriate structure if we can't host an in-... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/more-updates-indiana-republican-state-convention?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| Fellow Republicans,

Earlier today, your Indiana Republican State Committee met virtually, and we wanted to share with you the latest updates from their work as we prepare for the upcoming 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention.

The Indiana Republican Party’s **first goal remains to safely host an in-person state convention as planned on June 20 th**, dependent upon the latest facts as we continue to fight the global COVID-19 pandemic.

**However, if the situation won’t allow for an in-person convention to happen, your state committee today unanimously approved temporary rules that would allow for a convention’s appropriate structure to be built. This structure would ensure delegate participation in the selection of our lieutenant governor and attorney general nominees**.

You can read these temporary rules – which expire on October 1, 2020 – [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bb485ce1c4&e=1acd9bb3d6).

No matter the form our convention takes, be assured – your Indiana Republican State Committee is committed to protecting our delegates’ rights to select our party nominees for lieutenant governor and attorney general. **Through it all, delegates’ voices and votes are fundamental.**

We’ll continue to be transparent with you through every step of this process and update you again as soon as there is more information to share. Thank you for your work in support of our party, and please continue to share with me your input on this important topic.

Thank you,
Chairman Kyle Hupfer

subject: I served as President Obama’s Homeland Security Secretary — and I’m endorsing Teresa for Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17312944/190107650/-1393725340?refcode=em042920-header&refcode2=de2ad86f-5c8a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTJhZDg2Zi01YzhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amTfYgRV3MDyFbU2y0WTzS5HeVV7dVSceFgJJ8xnMjA=) **** | | Friend,

Well before I had the honor to serve as President Barack Obama’s Secretary of Homeland Security and a member of his Cabinet, I was a student at Atlanta’s Morehouse College. Georgia is a special place, and it deserves accountable, principled leadership with the experience to carry our nation forward.

[**Today I am enthusiastically endorsing Teresa Tomlinson for the United States Senate. Join me by making a contribution right now before her campaign’s April deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17312945/190107651/-1393725340?refcode=em042920-pm&refcode2=de2ad86f-5c8a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTJhZDg2Zi01YzhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amTfYgRV3MDyFbU2y0WTzS5HeVV7dVSceFgJJ8xnMjA=)

From my own time as President Obama’s Secretary of Homeland Security, it is my belief that the #1 obligation of a government is to protect the people it serves. Teresa was a very effective two-term Mayor of Columbus, leading that city to be ranked among the 25 Best Run Cities in America. And in Columbus, unlike most cities, the Mayor also serves as Public Safety Director and Head of Homeland Security for the region. As Mayor, Teresa held those positions for eight years — leading regional Homeland Security through mutual aid agreements, heading the Emergency Management Agency, and partnering with the Georgia Emergency Management Agency to provide coordinated responses to epidemics, pandemics, terrorist attacks, tornadoes, and more — including the regional response to a quarantined Ebola case in 2014, and to Hurricane Irma when Columbus received a state evacuation designation before being hit.

**In a time of unprecedented crisis for our country, we see more than ever that who we elect matters. That’s why I believe we need more experienced leaders like Teresa Tomlinson in the U.S. Senate.**

[**Teresa is a get-it-done public official who will deliver for Georgia. She is the candidate I trust to be ready on Day One — now please join me in supporting Georgia’s next Senator by making a donation right now before the April deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17312946/190107652/-1393725340?refcode=em042920-pm&refcode2=de2ad86f-5c8a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTJhZDg2Zi01YzhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=amTfYgRV3MDyFbU2y0WTzS5HeVV7dVSceFgJJ8xnMjA=)

name: Warren Democrats
subject: Two reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Right now is "go time" for Warren Democrats. We're keeping track of how many grassroots donations we receive every single day this week to reach as many voters as possible -- through advertisements... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e3/45c30650/1cac6f23c/66e90e06/3203036024/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Your donation would be incredibly impactful right now -- for a couple of reasons:
* Our next fundraising deadline is tomorrow -- your donation this month will help show our movement's continued strength on the next public fundraising report that becomes public at the end of the quarter.
* We're using every donation we receive today to make key investments that will help fight for needed relief during the pandemic crisis and elect strong Democrats up and down the ballot who will continue the fight for working families in 2021 and beyond.

Right now is "go time" for Warren Democrats. We're keeping track of how many grassroots donations we receive every single day this week to reach as many voters as possible -- through advertisements, online organizing trainings, and virtual town halls with Elizabeth and other Democrats.

That critical work is only possible with your support.

**We know not everyone is in a place to make a donation right now. And if you can 't, that's okay! [But if you are able to, please make a donation right now to help hit our April fundraising goal. Every contribution makes a difference.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257e3/45c30650/1cac6f23c/66e90e0c/3203036024/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1hcHIyMGZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVEyOUZfRU9NX0dSTV9EXzIwMjAwNDI5X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-apr20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMQ29F_EOM_GRM_D_20200429_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for all you do,

Warren Democrats

Friend,
I'm sorry to bother you with another email, but this simply can't wait.
**My April deadline is tomorrow at midnight** , and where the numbers currently stand, my campaign is still $71,450 short of reaching our end-of-month goal.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019ezIQjqbiSrWfFfBQ47qzEzOe0vwH9DBqmPlyH5arovWBEF4h6tzQr_uwVsf0xs0MtksUt9OmmiudopJ3aFs-23csvHVJ8DxpFV6d4jIoSerpwoa8mVpGRY2v2EB45AivBFVWDGFY8DM3h0PrTnwN3_h-jWBL9J8sU8ALZUcJUnFXtLtmPzvWv4s_YDFtyvYuOTv1N9idEd8AKED7XzKzzQB25YCJOxLZrlHKYY6_Avm33WgU3UVgQE03zJwSOigfnnTOE9R5ahqKLWqMtdCZc6MDspJz8rPhJlocyLVSzWkmCHrhne-FEcCo8dKIKz6StFfH3tkI9D8SHZh1cJg0G7tooi_abbW&c=CEM91efrgsJGq2oAggIRNfONrUB8WeGsf_VaLQKUgCCMY9-OKWkU9g==&ch=f_PHb-p9KQl6IiVn9kwPRLKoBWRxpQMh8nf83zAnOLyRlphSPvZGlQ==)
The Far Left dark money groups have millions in their war chest, and we must be prepared to fight back against their terrible false attacks. Over this past month alone, Chuck Schumer and his dark money SuperPAC ran **1,422 spots attacking me.** These attacks are only going to increase as we get closer to election day, and our campaign MUST be ready.
That is why my **Urgent Response Fund** is so important during the next two days. In order for our campaign strategy to work and get us over the finish line in November, we must reach our goals each and every month. So please, if you can afford it right now, [**contribute anything you can today to my Urgent Response Fund and help me reach our goals before the April deadline!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019ezIQjqbiSrWfFfBQ47qzEzOe0vwH9DBqmPlyH5arovWBEF4h6tzQr_uwVsf0xs0CY3-CQG1TZ3QtSxeFZpZKK2XEj62fn5ztJ44PRrHu67JTPQ7WdmYm4EHVRrpazEt-NDgHUyLU3K_aP-5lVoxKSWqw0NcmG-CWAcCkWFwx5iGuJo1xOK-9sAWWb1R-W4GOKpL9ifs_xTIedeBEcPNsD45tqlwZsm3a2Mnq2mSXuvooJQZZg6cMpxbgxin_NqFykTLlFlsOldtQQv1lMC7JcF5FHe3XcRB5WoVPeU-jAGlQnPZjSIw3Zk22TRyjk1vE_6tju22nVn7s3gxezPKNOBLwTzrc2fj&c=CEM91efrgsJGq2oAggIRNfONrUB8WeGsf_VaLQKUgCCMY9-OKWkU9g==&ch=f_PHb-p9KQl6IiVn9kwPRLKoBWRxpQMh8nf83zAnOLyRlphSPvZGlQ==)

body:
The countdown is on to this month’s End of Month Deadline, and let me be honest: our fundraising is nowhere near where we need to be to successfully e Peter, The countdown is on to this month’s End of Month Deadline, and let me be honest: our fundraising is nowhere near where we need to be to successfully end April.
We’re about $10,000 short of our goal and, without your help, I’m concerned we may not meet this goal at all. Pennsylvania is already a vulnerable state, and that’s why we need even MORE assistance from you at this point in the campaign.
This goal is a special one. Peter, this is when it counts most. This is the point of this race where we have to be full steam ahead, without looking back. We HAVE to be certain we make contact with every undecided voter at this point. Will you ensure we do just that? **APRIL END OF MONTH DEADLINE** Email: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=65661c36b8c94ef6ac067cdea0cf670b&_e=tiUeqNBiRajj_JLW6lo-2UNGyelgQ8kVqm9DFnUFzq4AsS9MLmzTQz9DC6K-P1zbOtVo57Vq8YJK1JGfGrWPINst8lMA-BUqL3GWPcPlz1o-Wa59Tl94EQdBkHZobwucmsxbNcPaw7xVILmJ1OBL38kU5r-Tqs1ognsWRC8TeeeJ8MxY8y418zDl-thv2IOQJZSQJD_4hK5_-WLNeTPRXts1DkCZJiDm2P-izA1y8uExWzCmz-Jq1ZuloMytFwLkJD-6RNuDP9bLo9unodi9-SLTdeW28Xe0v2Vx3qOKeDY0XHBNT8NzuVWocFj9RHKiSWoyMfv-iN2P45aeNN6nXPHspoV12OWVI8kQwnFZMtrqFi-SiTb5vMCohJfSna1-g-Nsv4AeIf0pdUzoyE77n2f_oi-x9CWE7E3Xn-5Igcxao3jt0pSXULw3PzqpKrms) Missing: **Peter**
Days left: **2** [ **CHIP IN $10** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=65661c36b8c94ef6ac067cdea0cf670b&_e=tiUeqNBiRajj_JLW6lo-2UNGyelgQ8kVqm9DFnUFzq4AsS9MLmzTQz9DC6K-P1zbOtVo57Vq8YJK1JGfGrWPII8H2hVl478AqVTWeqvrdX3TUeyYBCQhDWnCR58Z23IyXVRTLr3tVcDx5vldmqllffLo92cXCr5ji9qxrTPhIFZePGykHkiBg41eSsHplf5Bnvgt1N1fNFFMnyKvBaW4FXtIVyFcLvF5NnZ0W7SKBXChBzi-A42rp-fLnXHbdc3jazeYqg1lnux4RLWqo_ZB97jbK1R66XdXCemVHmrwHjMGyehk1_tFVQXxvJ0UcO54vnc-8J9RLWdGvvfzEJdU6FuGx9iY9oy4eE93ZyeVjk5hBd8p5ttnIYlPiPXz3MAZfYoWthJcrmH57uYQU0BR0trZGyrDdip_hFcFWKTbVW_Tjnojqf513m1taL9c8Q_pgfyMCZQPj0aDR6fJcgcQ-A%3D%3D) We have to send a message that Pennsylvania’s 7th district cannot afford another 2 years of Susan Wild’s Far-Left policies that would RAISE taxes, REVOKE our constitutional rights, and ensure that every conservative value in the valley is wiped out.
I believe I am the best candidate to successfully challenge and BEAT Radical Susan Wild in November. Are you with me? name: Bill Olson
subject: Can I request your help today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hHtwL1ps2_6OuRU&b=AICKLxJP0EvApD3hna4sLQ)
---
Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by embattled liberal Democrat Darren Soto. **

I must write you today on an urgent matter.

**You know how important Florida is to the President. **

The liberals in Congress and the Fake News media are trying to tear down the President's handling of the Coronavirus crisis.... right here in Florida.

_**Their latest? Blaming Trump for opening the Florida beaches!**_

It's nonsense, of course. Gov. DeSantis is doing a wonderful job keeping Floridians safe; President Trump is doing an amazing job handling this difficult crisis; and the beaches can be safe if people take appropriate cautions.

_Let's be clear- the media just want to use this crisis to tear down President Trump and Gov. DeSantis here in Florida!_

**Florida is so pivotal. We can't let the media throw this election to the Dems!**

I am working to make sure that I win my race and help the President win Florida also- but [I need your help!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hHtwL1ps2_6OuRU&b=AICKLxJP0EvApD3hna4sLQ)

The Dems and their media allies are putting out these lies. We need to get the REAL truth out too- and for that, can[ you help me?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hHtwL1ps2_6OuRU&b=AICKLxJP0EvApD3hna4sLQ)

[Can I count on you for a donation](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hHtwL1ps2_6OuRU&b=AICKLxJP0EvApD3hna4sLQ) of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I need to raise an additional $6,900 by the end of this month to pay for the needed advertising!

**The Democrats are going to lose this year **\- with your help!

_Let's get this done!_
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hHtwL1ps2_6OuRU&b=AICKLxJP0EvApD3hna4sLQ)
---
Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hHtwL1ps2_6OuRU&b=AICKLxJP0EvApD3hna4sLQ)
---

[I really need your help today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hHtwL1ps2_6OuRU&b=AICKLxJP0EvApD3hna4sLQ), so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I’m personally reaching out to you, one last time today, to make my case.
#
Here’s what’s going on:
Tomorrow at midnight is our campaign’s end-of-month fundraising deadline. This month, our goal is to get 500 grassroots donors to pitch in towards our campaign.
As of writing this email, we’ve got 431 donors. While it’d be awesome to get to 500 donors today, we only need 69 more donors to hit our goal by tomorrow.

It's not hard to understand why we are chronically unprepared for disasters. It's easy to reward voters with short-sighted policies that have immediate benefit. It's much harder to campaign on preparedness and long-term investment. And when disaster does strike, we all pay the price.
Susan Rice wrote an op-ed today titled "It's Not Enough to 'Get Back to Normal'". She writes "As we struggle through the Covid-19 crisis — the greatest challenge to global health, national security and our economy since World War II — we must ask again how we can emerge a more just, equitable and cohesive nation."
I couldn't agree more. **[Please, imagine a different future, and chip in to help make it happen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17315038/190149663/-704092404?refcode=RKC_042920_em_fr_all_eom4_L2FF&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTI1NmQwNi02ZjhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=smAgeCE0FL1zrumV3SD25LEOmtXfI0xI33LQOD0lZIA=)**

clean_body: | Dear Friend: I've got great news! Back on April 19th we surpassed our fundraising total for the entire last election cycle. That's a great foundation to build on. We're falling a little short this month, but that's not entirely unexpected given the enormous economic uncertainty we all face. We can keep things on the up slope with just $1,200 more before midnight tomorrow. = I'd truly appreciate it. Stay healthy, and thanks - Rick *** Begin Forwarded Message * Dear Friend -- Our virtual campaign requires more signage, more media, and more advertising time than a door to door campaign would. And we're still behind where we need to be. = | = It's not hard to understand why we are chronically unprepared for disasters. It's easy to reward voters with short-sighted policies that have immediate benefit. It's much harder to campaign on preparedness and long-term investment. And when disaster does strike, we all pay the price. Susan Rice wrote an op-ed today titled "It's Not Enough to 'Get Back to Normal'". She writes "As we struggle through the Covid-19 crisis — the greatest challenge to global health, national security and our economy since World War II — we must ask again how we can emerge a more just, equitable and cohesive nation." I couldn't agree more. = If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Be safe, and thank you, Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: John Philip Sousa IV
subject: Make it RED, Peter...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Peter, there's still time to turn it around... * | | |
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Dear Peter, We need your help to turn this ship around! You see, new polls show President Donald Trump and Black Conservative SUPERSTAR John James are currently **LOSING** \- _though very narrowly_ \- in the vitally important swing state of **Michigan**. Look at John James' numbers against incumbent Democrat Senator Gary Peters: [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SzKqfi&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EVMGBBB&) And look at this Quinnipiac poll showing a very close presidential race in Michigan: [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SzKqfi&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EhUAhcM&) Of course, there's still 6 months until Election Day... ...but we MUST work hard to **Make Michigan RED** for President Trump! ...and we MUST work hard to elect Black Conservative Superstar John James to the U.S. Senate in Michigan! So what's our plan to **Make Michigan RED** this election? **Run radio ads targeting African-American voters.** In fact, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC is currently running highly-effective radio ads on Black radio stations in Michigan and critical swing states and Congressional races across the country! Since 2013, we have invested millions of dollars on radio, television, billboards, books, and issue guides targeting African-America voters and exposing the race-baiting lies liberals have been spoon-feeding them... **...and the results have been incredible.** Study after study has shown that our ads over the past few years have significantly improved Republican votes from African-Americans. If we can take back just 17% of the black vote from Democrats, then it's impossible for them to win... ...and if we can convince 25% of Black voters to vote **RED** in 2020, we could create a massive RED TSUNAMI – up and down the ballot! | [Chip-In $20.20 to Make Michigan RED ›››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SzKqfi&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EGICBYS&)
---
**That's not as difficult as it sounds considering 33% of black voters already call themselves conservatives and support conservative policies --- but they still vote for Democrats.**
**Making Michigan RED** this election means touting President Trump's accomplishments for the Black community:
* Record low unemployment rate for African-Americans
* Federal funding for Historically Black Colleges and Universities
* Scholarships for African-American families seeking better quality schools
* Ending the killing of unborn Black babies by appointing conservative judges

[](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SzKqfi&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EE4tSur&)**Making Michigan RED** this election means electing John James as Michigan's first African American (from either party) to the United States Senate...
**Making Michigan RED** this election means persuading enough African-American voters to stop voting for the failed socialist policies that have turned Detroit and Flint into poverty-stricken war zones...
**Making Michigan RED** this election means mobilizing the conservative grassroots army that got Donald Trump elected four years ago...
That's why we need to keep our hard-hitting radio ads on Black radio stations in Michigan up-and-running through Election Day.
[Peter, can you please help us continue running effective radio ads in Michigan by giving a contribution of $20.20, $35, $75, $150 or more today?](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SzKqfi&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EQojFLC&)
Without the continued support of patriotic conservatives like you, there's no way we can keep our proven radio ads running...
...and the consequences of our failure in Michigan could result in the Democrats seizing control of the U.S. Senate and the White House --- _giving them the power to force their entire socialist agenda on every single American_.
[So please make your most generous contribution to keep our radio ads up-and-running through Election Day...](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SzKqfi&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EweIwef&)
...and please **FORWARD** this email to your patriotic friends and family-members.
Tell them how vitally important the swing state of Michigan is and how our effective radio ads will Make Michigan RED for President Trump and John James!
**Remember, if the Democrats lose just 17% of the African American vote, they cannot win!**
[How much we can do is in your hands, so please respond today.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SzKqfi&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EyMXSvC&)
Thank you, Peter! It's my honor to work beside you on behalf of America.
| _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_
---|---

Stars & Stripes Forever PAC (C) 2020\. All rights reserved.
_Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee._
National Headquarters | P.O. Box 1351 | Merrifield, VA 22116-1351
[www.StarsAndStripesForeverPAC.org](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SzKqfi&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EzfbMCk&)
---

You're receiving this email because you are committed to protecting America from rabid liberals hell-bent on destroying conservative values.
If you are giving up on this critical fight, please UNSUBSCRIBE below.
| | Stars & Stripes Forever PAC, PO Box 1351, 22116, Merrifield, United States
---
You may [unsubscribe](https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=3pvWd&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EI3u93A&pt=unsubscribe) or [change your contact details](https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=3pvWd&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EQNxCJR&pt=change_details) at any time.

name: Jenny, Finance Director
subject: in a bit of a tough situation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Right now, every donation to keep Mark Warner in the Senate fighting for us will be doubled.
|
---
| | Derek,

I'm going to level with you: we're in a bit of a tough situation right now. I'm going to make a fundraising ask of you at the end of this email, but first let me explain why.

Our fundraising has understandably slowed down in April. We know that this is a difficult time for many folks between the ongoing pandemic and the state of our economy. I want to thank everyone who has made a donation -- this week, this month, this quarter. Thank you for showing your continued support for Mark Warner.

**I think it 's never been clearer that we need leaders like Mark in the Senate.** He's working hard for _every_ Virginian: fighting to make sure bi-partisan relief packages benefit Main Street over Wall Street, calling on internet service providers to expand access and remove restrictive broadband caps for rural Virginians, and demanding increased testing in the areas that need it most. In moments of uncertainty, we need people like Mark, who are willing to roll up their sleeves and work until the job is done.

The Senator's team is working so hard every day to get him re-elected, and I'm amazed by the innovations they've come up with. We haven't been able to have an in-person event in almost two months, but this team is working tirelessly to give folks the opportunity to engage online with virtual town halls and digital organizing opportunities. They're doing their part to make sure that the campaign keeps moving forward, and we need to continue raising the funds necessary to communicate his tremendous work to every Virginia voter.

Right now, every donation to keep Mark Warner in the Senate fighting for us will be **doubled**. I know that many are facing hardship right now, but I'm asking that you consider supporting real leadership in Washington.

**[Any amount you can give today will help get us that much closer to meeting our April fundraising goal, and your contribution will be matched for an even greater impact. Will you consider chipping in?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4ce/53d9897e/54f8d0cf/1c886df4/1095771426/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-2x?refcode=20200429_f_1_nd__561__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thank you so much for your support,
Jenny Nadicksbernd
Finance Director

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4ce/53d9897e/54f8d0cf/1c886df3/1095771426/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-2x?refcode=20200429_f_1_nd__561__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---
|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4ce/53d9897e/54f8d0cf/1c886df2/1095771426/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: Georgette =?iso-8859-1?b?R/NtZXo=?=
subject: Much has changed, but the reasons I am running have not.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17315133/190155278/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIwNzQ0MC03MThhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuWedigOHn3iy8CX0lfU_5oqeRdpMTbuhUiCroBVprc=&emci=10b07440-718a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=1ab07440-718a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)
Friend --

When we launched this campaign, I never would have imagined that we'd be campaigning during a global pandemic.

I haven't seen my campaign staff in-person in weeks. I have to admit, the disconnect of conference calls and video chats is beginning to wear on me. We've also had to cancel all of our in-person events like group phone banks.

As a grassroots campaign, we're still processing how our volunteer efforts will look in the next couple of months.

**Much has changed, but the reasons I am running have not.**

San Diego is my home. I grew up in Barrio Logan, and my life's work has been centered around addressing injustices and improving the quality of life for our communities. It's what I've been devoted to since day one on the City Council.

This campaign is about truly addressing the issues we face -- whether we’re talking about this pandemic, expanding affordable housing, ending poverty, achieving environmental justice, or fixing health care access for all.

**[I'm up against a big end-of-month fundraising deadline in 24 hours, and right now we’re falling short. Can I count on you to contribute $3 to help us pick up the pace? I wouldn’t reach out like this if it wasn't important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17315134/190155279/1147193815?refcode=em-200429-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIwNzQ0MC03MThhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuWedigOHn3iy8CX0lfU_5oqeRdpMTbuhUiCroBVprc=)**

I'll be blunt: my least favorite part of campaigning for Congress has been the fundraising. And I don't believe for a second that money is the most important factor in winning this race.

But when you make a donation, you're doing more than just funding our efforts. You're sending a message that this San Diego community is resilient and is ready for some home-grown, progressive change in Washington.
That, to me, is much more powerful, and it's why I value your support so much -- especially right now.

**[Before this deadline hits, please add a donation of $3 to help us hit our goal. We can get there if all work together to do it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17315135/190155280/1147193815?refcode=em-200429-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIwNzQ0MC03MThhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuWedigOHn3iy8CX0lfU_5oqeRdpMTbuhUiCroBVprc=)**

Thank you — from the bottom of my heart.

_Georgette Gómez_

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q2-2020?refcode=em-200429-all-b)**

---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17315136/190155281/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIwNzQ0MC03MThhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuWedigOHn3iy8CX0lfU_5oqeRdpMTbuhUiCroBVprc=&emci=10b07440-718a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=1ab07440-718a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864) Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community.

_**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please [make a donation here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17315137/190155282/1147193815?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIwNzQ0MC03MThhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuWedigOHn3iy8CX0lfU_5oqeRdpMTbuhUiCroBVprc=). We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/10b07440-718a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/1ab07440-718a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIwNzQ0MC03MThhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuWedigOHn3iy8CX0lfU_5oqeRdpMTbuhUiCroBVprc=&id=110960909&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Protecting our borders during a pandemic
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ALtkjA3qO7lAUY-00uBRB_rKAiHlDcgrEYk3Xfc6-wHfJbfayTZDSFCBK4YfdijbtyH7WDo5Le2vyXFEI1jBXARa4n5HoKkNvZQeblzGD4_EcbugJuOPUYPEm07I9b5amShwb9Cm9HVMd_885tuyk3PnCzXofpTNtHAQIRN2Y1ZKjukdgCqemg==&c=7SPrLz90fAA-V6PIOSBDnEBjIoap98lCz-2cx50Tr6yCtSmiAq7k_Q==&ch=nw1IGGPNI96vZoRFFu6E2L_yjXk5FQvpUcKAgP5_nVyBMUfpltsrYQ==)
---
| Patriot,
I recently introduced the PANDEMIC Act to deport all detained illegal immigrants while we face the spread of the coronavirus. In dealing with global pandemics, protecting our borders from unknown and undocumented people who could be carrying the virus should be a priority. Mexico and other countries have already seen success with this enforcement, and it's time we do the same.
I sat down with Tucker Carlson on Tuesday to talk more about the bill:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ALtkjA3qO7lAUY-00uBRB_rKAiHlDcgrEYk3Xfc6-wHfJbfayTZDSFCBK4YfdijbtyH7WDo5Le2vyXFEI1jBXARa4n5HoKkNvZQeblzGD4_EcbugJuOPUYPEm07I9b5amShwb9Cm9HVMd_885tuyk3PnCzXofpTNtHAQIRN2Y1ZKjukdgCqemg==&c=7SPrLz90fAA-V6PIOSBDnEBjIoap98lCz-2cx50Tr6yCtSmiAq7k_Q==&ch=nw1IGGPNI96vZoRFFu6E2L_yjXk5FQvpUcKAgP5_nVyBMUfpltsrYQ==)
---
| | | [WATCH THE VIDEO](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ALtkjA3qO7lAUY-00uBRB_rKAiHlDcgrEYk3Xfc6-wHfJbfayTZDSFCBK4YfdijbtyH7WDo5Le2vyXFEI1jBXARa4n5HoKkNvZQeblzGD4_EcbugJuOPUYPEm07I9b5amShwb9Cm9HVMd_885tuyk3PnCzXofpTNtHAQIRN2Y1ZKjukdgCqemg==&c=7SPrLz90fAA-V6PIOSBDnEBjIoap98lCz-2cx50Tr6yCtSmiAq7k_Q==&ch=nw1IGGPNI96vZoRFFu6E2L_yjXk5FQvpUcKAgP5_nVyBMUfpltsrYQ==)
---
| As an elected official, it is my duty is to protect the health and safety of Americans. I will fight for my PANDEMIC Act in Congress, but I'm also going to need your support.
The Radical Left wants to open our borders and empty our prisons in a time of crisis. We need to push back and fight for common-sense immigration laws during a global pandemic.
I need you to show your support and sign my petition! If you value the health and safety of Americans, click below and SIGN YOUR NAME:
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ALtkjA3qO7lAUY-00uBRB_rKAiHlDcgrEYk3Xfc6-wHfJbfayTZDSFCBK4YfdijbtyH7WDo5Le2vyXFEI1jBXARa4n5HoKkNvZQeblzGD4_EcbugJuOPUYPEm07I9b5amShwb9Cm9HVMd_885tuyk3PnCzXofpTNtHAQIRN2Y1ZKjukdgCqemg==&c=7SPrLz90fAA-V6PIOSBDnEBjIoap98lCz-2cx50Tr6yCtSmiAq7k_Q==&ch=nw1IGGPNI96vZoRFFu6E2L_yjXk5FQvpUcKAgP5_nVyBMUfpltsrYQ==)
---
| God bless America,
---
|
---
| Matt Gaetz
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ALtkjA3qO7lAUY-00uBRB_rKAiHlDcgrEYk3Xfc6-wHfJbfayTZDSDqFP1GUgEJ_ETV18Lu3CMbOYL8ivsjduqkowx5tCPQEoTIATT7FN9bMmwP6UFzY_zzi-Kse9KhONkRf54Uxst4pykHBIn3qot1Dit3xs-7SU2r_JADQpCMD2ng7aeZfXQ==&c=7SPrLz90fAA-V6PIOSBDnEBjIoap98lCz-2cx50Tr6yCtSmiAq7k_Q==&ch=nw1IGGPNI96vZoRFFu6E2L_yjXk5FQvpUcKAgP5_nVyBMUfpltsrYQ==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ALtkjA3qO7lAUY-00uBRB_rKAiHlDcgrEYk3Xfc6-wHfJbfayTZDSDqFP1GUgEJ_eb9n40CsuT4rD480vc0_GKC3upFbtS_wAOWViL4ZRCs2Kkb8G3YdRJ7BQ41hL7cq0-qUGbL9uJPOV-lxW6oNCg==&c=7SPrLz90fAA-V6PIOSBDnEBjIoap98lCz-2cx50Tr6yCtSmiAq7k_Q==&ch=nw1IGGPNI96vZoRFFu6E2L_yjXk5FQvpUcKAgP5_nVyBMUfpltsrYQ==)

body:
David has been working non-stop to achieve a list of goals he set for our campaign when we first hit the ground Dear Peter, David has been working non-stop to achieve a list of goals he set for our campaign when we first hit the ground and began talking about the need to Fix Congress. This list included:
1. Build one of the strongest grassroots teams any Oklahoma Congressional campaign has seen
2. Defeat Kendra Horn and give Oklahomans in CD-5 the Republican voice we deserve in Congress
3. Help President Trump stand up to Nancy Pelosi and Congressional Democrats’ reckless obstruction tactics and radical left-wing agenda

| |
---
**Because of you, we’ve knocked out that first goal** — our team's momentum is building, and we are well on our way to defeating Kendra Horn in November.

Now, our campaign is focused on checking off our next two goals, which starts today, **by raising $2,000 BY TOMORROW**. We are currently about 63% of the way to achieving our goal, **and w e need your help to keep our momentum going!**

Please show your support for our campaign to unseat Democrat Kendra Horn and bring real Oklahoma values and common sense to Washington.

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: everything you need to know about voting in the 2020 primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **** For the first time in history, every single Hoosier voter can vote by mail. If you’re wondering how you can do it, we’ve got you covered. Here’s everything you need to know about voting in the 2020 primary: ******There are three ways to register to vote:**
1. Register online [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17315636/190167961/-1499154792?emci=8da04d5a-2386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWUzNWFlZi03NzhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qm343Jbb_Xqo5EpWYQpqgTvakbR49DOWefbigXAKru8=) if you have an Indiana driver’s license or ID.
2. You can print the [Voter Registration Application](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17315637/190167962/629425687?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWUzNWFlZi03NzhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qm343Jbb_Xqo5EpWYQpqgTvakbR49DOWefbigXAKru8=&emci=9da1f95d-648a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=a9e35aef-778a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535) and mail in the form. Any registration form postmarked on or before May 4 can be accepted if the voter is otherwise eligible.
3. You can call your county clerk. If their office is open, you can ask to pick up the form and complete it.

******Your county clerk must have your application by May 21.** If they receive your application after May 21, even if it is postmarked before, it will not be counted. So, apply now! **There are three ways to apply to vote by mail:**
1. Fill out your application online at [indianavoters.in.gov](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17315638/190167963/-1499154792?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWUzNWFlZi03NzhhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qm343Jbb_Xqo5EpWYQpqgTvakbR49DOWefbigXAKru8=&emci=9da1f95d-648a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=a9e35aef-778a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)
2. name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Make your voice heard on June 23rd
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, We have a critical election approaching on June 23rd, and we need to make sure every Republican voter casts a ballot. As New York continues to combat the coronavirus, all voters are now eligible to vote by absentee ballot - we cannot let this virus stop us from exercising our fundamental right to vote! **This election will determine whether we have a Congressman who will stand with President Trump and fight for Western New York and our conservative values or someone like my opponent who will vote lockstep with Nancy Pelosi.** [If you haven't already, please take a moment to request an absentee ballot application by clicking here. Our campaign will make sure you receive an application by either mail or email.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/zv1zp4PIp7k5x9mpkw4nKw/XxtdMLU8ge7OVxATNs8n8w) **I 'm proud to have the President's endorsement and I'm ready to fight with him in Congress. The President and I are counting on your vote. ** As always, stay safe and thank you for your continued support. If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out to our campaign at info@jacobs4congress.com. Sincerely, Chris Jacobs [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/hZwW4XohhH3Z1VHGtkrWsA/XxtdMLU8ge7OVxATNs8n8w)

name: Mike Franken
subject: Just one month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Today's command is, "All engines ahead full." That's the command given for a high-speed run for a relatively short duration on a warship at sea. Now's the time, the end of April, when we need the numb
|
---
| |
---

| | Hello everyone: Today's command is, "All engines ahead full." That's the command given for a high-speed run for a relatively short duration on a warship at sea. Now's the time, the end of April, when we need the numbers to blow the pundits off their perch -- because FRANKEN FOR IOWA has the trajectory to win this primary. My opponent in this year-long effort is Sen. Joni Ernst, but I must first win the primary. Our most valuable outreach tool, meeting Iowans in person, has been covidly-curtailed. Okay, we adapted. Our TV ad is doing well (rave reviews); our social media is going coast-to-coast; and our volunteer outreach is banging out over a thousand calls per day. We can hand Joni Ernst and the Trump-era Republicans a big defeat in Iowa, but first the primary. **As Kimberley stated, we are just under $85,000 from having the resources needed for May. I ask you to help.**[_**We 're activating our grassroots donors to contribute before midnight on May 2nd.**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ab/33365068/4a740903/3f8bf6bb/436962296/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200429_eom2_em_fr_all_L1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ab/33365068/4a740903/3f8bf6b4/436962296/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200429_eom2_em_fr_all_abx5")
---
[DONATE $10 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ab/33365068/4a740903/3f8bf6b5/436962296/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200429_eom2_em_fr_all_abx10")
---
[DONATE $25 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ab/33365068/4a740903/3f8bf6b6/436962296/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200429_eom2_em_fr_all_abx25")
---
[Other Amount >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ab/33365068/4a740903/3f8bf6b7/436962296/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=15&refcode=FRA_20200429_eom2_em_fr_all_abxother")
---
Survive this pandemic, rebuild our economy, fix health care, kick-start an infrastructure plan, and make Iowa's agriculture sector viable -- these are action items for Congress under a new leadership. Send me, I'm ready. No training wheels needed.
[_**But, I can 't win in November if we don't win on June 2nd. So, if you can, please chip in to help us chart a course to victory!**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ab/33365068/4a740903/3f8bf6b0/436962296/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200429_eom2_em_fr_all_L2")
Thank you, and very respectfully,
Mike Franken
Iowa's Admiral

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ab/33365068/4a740903/3f8bf6b1/436962296/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200429_eom2_em_fr_all_ftr")

My opponent in this year-long effort is Sen. Joni Ernst, but I must first win the primary. Our most valuable outreach tool, meeting Iowans in person, has been covidly-curtailed. Okay, we adapted. Our TV ad is doing well (rave reviews); our social media is going coast-to-coast; and our volunteer outreach is banging out over a thousand calls per day. We can hand Joni Ernst and the Trump-era Republicans a big defeat in Iowa, but first the primary. As Kimberley stated, we are just under $85,000 from having the resources needed for May. I ask you to help. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" "" "" "" Survive this pandemic, rebuild our economy, fix health care, kick-start an infrastructure plan, and make Iowa's agriculture sector viable -- these are action items for Congress under a new leadership. Send me, I'm ready. No training wheels needed. "" Thank you, and very respectfully, Mike Franken Iowa's Admiral "" | Paid for by Franken for Iowa Michael Franken was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Franken for Iowa PO Box 3171 Sioux City, IA 51102

name: Nikki Foster
subject: Fight another day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---

| | When I led combat missions in the U.S. Air Force, I had to make tough decisions. Sometimes, we had to adapt to new intel, change our plans, and turn around. When I led combat missions in the U.S. Air Force, I had to make tough decisions. Sometimes, we had to adapt to new intel, change our plans, and turn around. **But I always knew that we would be back soon to fight another day.** I just confirmed the news: we lost our primary election. I won't be the candidate facing Steve Chabot this November. **But be sure that we 'll fight on. I'm committed to working together with Kate Schroder to take down Chabot, he's gotten away with hurting working families for far too long.** No matter the result, this campaign has done something. Thousands of folks came together and acknowledged that their government has been failing them. **This is huge -- this is the first step toward the change we need.** And while I wasn't chosen to bring about that change this time around, you better believe I'll continue to marshall support, keep folks engaged, and demand better for working families. That's what this has always been about. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for believing in that mission and for believing in me. Congratulations to Kate Schroder, I'm excited to work together to unite the party and take down Steve Chabot this fall. Yours, Nikki Foster
---

|
---
| We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Peter,
I'm sorry to bother you with another email, but this simply can't wait.
**My April deadline is tomorrow at midnight** , and where the numbers currently stand, my campaign is still $71,450 short of reaching our end-of-month goal.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzODc3NTUS1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzA0NTczOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
The Far Left dark money groups have millions in their war chest, and we must be prepared to fight back against their terrible false attacks. Over this past month alone, Chuck Schumer and his dark money SuperPAC ran **1,422 spots attacking me.** These attacks are only going to increase as we get closer to election day, and our campaign MUST be ready.
That is why my **Urgent Response Fund** is so important during the next two days. In order for our campaign strategy to work and get us over the finish line in November, we must reach our goals each and every month. So please, if you can afford it right now, [**contribute anything you can today to my Urgent Response Fund and help me reach our goals before the April deadline!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDIzODc3NTUS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MzA0NTczOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Christy
subject: Time is running out ⏰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

A lot has changed since we entered our special election in March.

* Our race rating has changed from Lean Democratic to Toss-Up.

* Republican special interests have pumped more than $2 million into the race to support our opponent's attack ads.

* Donald Trump tweeted his support of Mike Garcia.

* And we've shifted to a fully digital operation while we're in the midst of a global pandemic of proportions we've never seen before.

**What hasn't changed is this: We are running a campaign to elect a proven leader in less than two weeks who will cut through the nonsense and get to work for the people of CA-25 from day 1 in Congress.**

**[We NEED to elect Christy, and to do that, we need to meet our fundraising goal by tomorrow at midnight. Can you rush a donation right now to make sure we get there?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb44/29776869/a4d6e35/569f64bd/2847613924/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjlfZW9tNS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200429_eom5-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb44/29776869/a4d6e35/569f64be/2847613924/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjlfZW9tNS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200429_eom5-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb44/29776869/a4d6e35/569f64bf/2847613924/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjlfZW9tNS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200429_eom5-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb44/29776869/a4d6e35/569f64b8/2847613924/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjlfZW9tNS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200429_eom5-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb44/29776869/a4d6e35/569f64b9/2847613924/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjlfZW9tNS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200429_eom5-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb44/29776869/a4d6e35/569f64ba/2847613924/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjlfZW9tNS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200429_eom5-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb44/29776869/a4d6e35/569f64bd/2847613924/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjlfZW9tNS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith_eom?refcode=em20_200429_eom5-full")
No matter the changes in circumstances, we are still running with all our might to elect Christy because we know she will work day-in and day-out for us.

She will fight for our health care, for our schools, and for our families.

**And now more than ever, we need her to be there working for us as we try to recover from this pandemic.**

The special election is coming up on May 12th, and we're still $53,762 short of where we need to be for our end-of-month goal.

**[Now, more than ever before, we need you to step up before our final end-of-month fundraising push. name: Tom Cotton
subject: Need 199 more supporters to hit goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
While the mainstream media and Democrats were focused on impeaching President Trump, I was raising alarms about a new virus in Wuhan, China. The mainstream media attacked me and called my concerns nothing more than conspiracy theories. name: Team Kennedy
subject: A different email than usual (please take 3 minutes to read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390657/55b66746/207fd4cd/80e5832/816906558/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Hey, a bit of a different email today. We haven't talked politics in a while but want to reach out about two things. **First, we want to make an important distinction about this Senate race.[ Then, we want to ask you to pitch in $3 to recommit to our fight.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390657/55b66746/207fd4cd/80e583d/816906558/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?refcode=2020-04-29-whyjoerecap&recurring=0&amount=3")** **This is a long email, but we'd be grateful if you took a few moments to read.**
* * *
Over the past month, the Senate race in Massachusetts has changed. Our world has been turned upside down. Our priorities and perspectives have shifted. And the question of leadership has taken on new meaning and new urgency. We have seen leaders fall horribly short - our President chief among them. But we've also seen leaders rise to the challenge. And without a doubt, Joe has met this moment. He has shown up for the communities and families that have gone underserved and under-protected for generations. He has shown up for those most in need. He has shown up for all of us. Every moment of his has been filled making phone calls, tracking down PPE for our frontlines. Holding live streams on social media bringing the stories of those impacted into the public eye. Raising tens of thousands of dollars for charities. Directing his volunteer network to check on vulnerable residents rather than push his own campaign. The last few days he has been making stops across Massachusetts (with PPE on and social distancing intact!) to hand-deliver food to hospitals, delivery workers, and others on the frontlines. **Because that has what he has done his entire career: show up. Where the need is greatest, where the hurt hits hardest, where others haven't.** Senator Markey's reputation and record are different. He isn't here enough. He isn't in _Massachusetts_ __ enough. And we can't afford absent leadership right now. **We need better than the status quo. We need leadership in a Senator who will be on the ground - fighting by our side - as we recover and rebuild. ** [**So, we're asking, If you are financially able, could you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign? With your help, we can win our primary on September 1, and give Massachusetts the leadership it needs in the U.S. Senate during a time of unprecedented crisis.**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390657/55b66746/207fd4cd/80e583d/816906558/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?refcode=2020-04-29-whyjoerecap&recurring=0&amount=3") We know how difficult these times are, and we know a donation may be out of the question for many. That's ok, and from the bottom of our hearts, we are grateful for the support, energy, attention, and love that you give this campaign every day. But we are asking because we believe this fight has taken on a new urgency. Our path ahead is long and hard. Massachusetts is going to need the very best representation at every level of government to get through this. We need someone who will show up on the frontlines. Someone who will fight in the trenches _with us._ Someone who will listen. And someone who will lead. Joe has made it clear he's up for the challenge. So let's give Massachusetts the leadership we deserve. Team Kennedy [Pitch in $3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390657/55b66746/207fd4cd/80e583d/816906558/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-fight?refcode=2020-04-29-whyjoerecap&recurring=0&amount=3") |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390657/55b66746/207fd4cd/80e583f/816906558/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390657/55b66746/207fd4cd/80e5839/816906558/VEsA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390657/55b66746/207fd4cd/80e583b/816906558/VEsB/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390657/55b66746/207fd4cd/80e5846/816906558/VEsO/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.instagram.com/joekennedyiii/")

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [**Switch to our less email option here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390657/55b66746/207fd4cd/80e5847/816906558/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com; [click here to change your email address](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390657/55b66746/207fd4cd/80e5840/816906558/VEsHBQ/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/update-address/"). If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, [click here to get off all our lists instantly.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390657/55b66746/207fd4cd/80e5841/816906558/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390657/55b66746/207fd4cd/80e5842/816906558/VEsHBw/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/contact/"). |

name: Stephanie Schriock
subject: RE: Kathy Manning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Here's why:
|
---

| | Friend, Hi there -- I'm Stephanie Schriock, the president of EMILY's List. **At EMILY 's List, we elect strong pro-choice Democratic women, and we're so proud to endorse Kathy Manning.** | | | [Donate](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d315/3d199a51/2f75782b/7364fda4/2737839828/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQyOSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200429?refcode=kme200429_m_other&refcode2=17426")
---
When we endorsed Kathy for her 2018 campaign, I spoke to her about her personal experience as a mother who was concerned about being able to afford the health care her daughter needed while suffering from a chronic illness.
Kathy knew that no parent should have to choose between paying a child's medical bills or being able to afford to put food on the table for their family. She knew that something had to change, and she ran for office to change it.
**That 's why Kathy is exactly the kind of strong leader we need in Congress right now.**
Kathy ran a strong race in 2018 and, while she didn't prevail, we're thrilled that she's running again in the newly-drawn 6th District.
Kathy will be a champion for North Carolinians -- one who will fight to make sure they have access to high-quality and affordable health care and education, and who will fight to safeguard our values and our rights.
[_**At EMILY 's List, we know that early support is essential to building strong campaigns that can win on Election Day. And that's why I'm reaching out to you today: Will you make a contribution to Kathy's campaign and send a strong leader to Washington?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d315/3d199a51/2f75782b/7364fda4/2737839828/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQyOSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200429?refcode=kme200429_m_other&refcode2=17426")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | | [Donate $10](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d315/3d199a51/2f75782b/7364fda4/2737839828/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQyOSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200429?refcode=kme200429_m_other&refcode2=17426")
