name: MJ Hegar Finance HQ
subject: How we'll flip the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We've built a team that can take on Sen. Cornyn, and you're a critical part.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900f4/7f51f7bc/4fd9fb1f/4ef17b3f/3992285325/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **End-of-month goal: $60,000
Deadline: Midnight 4/30/20** **[MAKE A MATCHED DONATION](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900f4/7f51f7bc/4fd9fb1f/4ef17b3d/3992285325/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprileommatch?refcode=email_20200429.3nd__1308__&amount=10")**
---
Peter -- We are so grateful for the support of our grassroots team, especially when so many people are feeling the struggle of the pandemic.

Our team of **over 42,000 donors** is going to be crucial to defeating Sen. Cornyn and flipping the Senate this November. While Sen. Cornyn has filled his war chest with money from Big Pharma, the insurance industry, and countless other special interests, MJ isn't taking a DIME from corporate PACs.

**Will you join our 42,000 donor team to help us hit our end-of-month goal, secure the nomination, and DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900f4/7f51f7bc/4fd9fb1f/4ef17b33/3992285325/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprileommatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200429.3nd__1308__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900f4/7f51f7bc/4fd9fb1f/4ef17b31/3992285325/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprileommatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200429.3nd__1308__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900f4/7f51f7bc/4fd9fb1f/4ef17b37/3992285325/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprileommatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200429.3nd__1308__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900f4/7f51f7bc/4fd9fb1f/4ef17b35/3992285325/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprileommatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200429.3nd__1308__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900f4/7f51f7bc/4fd9fb1f/4ef17b34/3992285325/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprileommatch?refcode=email_20200429.3nd__1308__")**
\-- Team MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900f4/7f51f7bc/4fd9fb1f/4ef17b3d/3992285325/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprileommatch?refcode=email_20200429.3nd__1308__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900f4/7f51f7bc/4fd9fb1f/4ef17b2a/3992285325/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzMDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1308&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648900f4/7f51f7bc/4fd9fb1f/4ef17b28/3992285325/VEsHBQ/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana: 10 mental health tips from our crew
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
The last month has been hard on everyone — whether you’re dealing with the economic fall out of COVID-19, the virus itself, or have been cooped up in [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=542af19dd23b410a9978ae96c4c0d849&_e=kAyLQI2h68hte9gun6Tir0zM8VClgl7C3Y_uPManLZpMmjnWGBpTTJJISQaROMvu2qYjbGffDRnFclTAyiUSNiXH0dz_eJeNmmGzld8JgagypXYz7t-LjqUwyiwPnP_lw2u3BbBnjpeM6__xmEREWJRJZ2xsJZheV332iCfIoCfWrKLcU4wb1wigEwU7SwJiRpvB71qEsEL3ccn_WzAk7uitDdgFOgvtVD3JAfqKwgfuki2ZWwXUseam-hz_vAdKG051twaDv7KGL2I19XRjGNHYkm57RvCWV6lYs4RRh8_sTp_fhGj8hUWs3u775kyuvwh9UQULSmfytg3NCDFu33mPdkXl_umUpLnlmjSkBRajJVhnhKfjBJqA48a5_Fo0) Friend,
**This isn’t easy.** We know that Hoosiers are going through a lot. _The last month has been hard on everyone — whether you’re dealing with the economic fall out of COVID-19, the virus itself, or have been cooped up in your house for more than a month._ We’re all focused on keeping our loved ones physically healthy, but we also need to make sure that we’re all taking care of our mental health, too. We’re focused on helping Hoosiers get through this crisis in any way that we can. The governor just rolled a **[new website designed to help Hoosiers take care of their mental health](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=542af19dd23b410a9978ae96c4c0d849&_e=kAyLQI2h68hte9gun6Tir0zM8VClgl7C3Y_uPManLZpMmjnWGBpTTJJISQaROMvu2qYjbGffDRnFclTAyiUSNiXH0dz_eJeNmmGzld8JgagypXYz7t-LjqUwyiwPnP_lw2u3BbBnjpeM6__xmEREWJRJZ2xsJZheV332iCfIoCf4y1m35RW6BBatTPvUiTpkin9m3JbK6LoEtHAzsq9bcMIeegp40W79ZUn0mDIDarMdJ_w10ny4JOzBqICP_qpCCrhWzYSAT6Iw26PChmt1pxGDbdx9Jyva42pIbQzEMfA8XLXSPC3aLgNseMRnQHiSZI7bjOaZvUwQ4SY8mW546crVBa1s75TfFeyr5MQTdeOY9jHDNIe9Zr29p3-dAiaN)** and our team pulled together a list of activities that we’ve been trying out to help put our minds at ease. Check it out below! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=542af19dd23b410a9978ae96c4c0d849&_e=kAyLQI2h68hte9gun6Tir0zM8VClgl7C3Y_uPManLZpMmjnWGBpTTJJISQaROMvu2qYjbGffDRnFclTAyiUSNiXH0dz_eJeNmmGzld8JgagypXYz7t-LjqUwyiwPnP_lw2u3BbBnjpeM6__xmEREWJRJZ2xsJZheV332iCfIoCfS0vhKwdbUgltZMhv6DSw9SxXG4kPEwQ1j7-vfCyMhrsiR5X9_1Z43ia3AXXB-Fb_Ze3smjJEK-7gJCcEEy06jlYdvkwef31MMNZUJWgS53qesR4hAGikA_9tt8Eid5zzGyzlIedaKJ9aXcKkeyH91htpipDygkhM1Og9kyt6a3ztB4mIp_0Yw3eUF-cWunMUHUlZ0O5ycR2SNS95Eb6ci) **Try a new recipe** \- cooking is a great way to pass the time and it’s never a bad idea to try something new. You could try some of our team’s favorites — a sugar cream pie or a Hoosier pork tenderloin! **Listen to music** \- listening to our favorite music always helps us relax. There are plenty of great Hoosier musicians if you want to keep it in the state, like John Mellencamp or Josh Kaufman! **Read a new book** \- this is an oldie, but a goodie. All of **[these books](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=542af19dd23b410a9978ae96c4c0d849&_e=kAyLQI2h68hte9gun6TirwEdQLXrcCaemPUTW6WI53Le4vC70fYBhe6BLA_ESD0Z62uyktxG2F3uiI3VSdgMKgfqcD5arcRSh1URc9_kNXW7hILW6Se-w2edq7Gj6De2LrUNO32G-JKfAfWNYnod7bwB1d1QRIO0bWa3DkB35ODcgc--QIZI0GulmVV7WD9Xo2COAK4tU4ZfLIxiNPtgBVvfpebCVnAdqbldfGdJdCyB2peA04ZTdEcs_O4vI-AvEtI3qpk7CiotfPsnaq18MAt-A6LRcQvCSNRkaDoCPAb6CtyCI8UDvpdZb-OYivSNL1EvLkfqlR91jFT-4-LYdxxLaQnR--IlXviRU3z2OU-I6tdgzJNXyL9nUm7UIXpuc0A7umaFcpaGdDcJcHoCC0gF-Vu-B1OT43yZSaDHnqY%3D)** are set in Indiana and will help pass the time and keep you in a good place. **Reach out to some old friends** \- it’s a great time to call, text, Skype, Zoom or just connect with old friends that you haven’t seen since you started hunkering down. **Get outside for a walk, run or stroll (while socially distancing) **— exercise is a great way to stay physically and mentally healthy. You could even go for a walk or a hike in one of our amazing [**state parks**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=542af19dd23b410a9978ae96c4c0d849&_e=kAyLQI2h68hte9gun6TirzPriNmGp9rkNIQdh_AWB4_CH8Rm6W-8Ktj-gZtTyY7285dgaZPUOLLyG7b023pcVp1yDTyxF6uqNeuepVdUTc8KpkbSg855pMyMSUBT2hTKiNAjSRUUxB4Gk_XJ6TOCFRejq0EwDa09cKlgoMJGVV_64Y70x0JdHNJFgF6PlrFLZ4v5Kk8B0fvRhPzjpad-MyNeF1QWER1NdOVuhgvYxrbgH5WVyv34cCI8pTkvghktrj0YPp2CSX2pdElK3-46otobxFI4FX1lIZ6eIA2E2nARUKqzmxBteetttxLkFWUmkXLK284BgqdPD2hnsjwvEvVSPK-V9BywDZnjxwpiRDnQ4nGohD-dmUR8zD4Nblp8jZ9qC7KtrKquUuqY8BU9sg%3D%3D). **Do a jigsaw puzzle** \- it’s always a good time to take a stab at a jigsaw puzzle. Check out these **[Indiana-themed digital puzzles](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=542af19dd23b410a9978ae96c4c0d849&_e=kAyLQI2h68hte9gun6Tir4k1TYJw8ZgHzhOBMyfnYFjtcicZUvaQLeI8w9GLx13_cy8SS2llmmARr3GODeLG6CjedOC7m0NDNsB_9KkopXDlrWJlQvR5WTUQwiSK8LvKP2ujCmPe-CT-PvPbhV0gydZl-js35hNLmTulmUaaaWFXC6xpudoZIA5l82zaZpDiZHkbH5NHlrW1GzFhtk1U5FNRSNebzYRTik_GTIiLSIHre_kI54G9GZBNqyA5LS1cGx_ukI1NQvROMdcH_Qk-kwrWtblFmK0pYFZ8RdJv1uR15c0mIkTLXEIRIApOA5HlKqxWYcSm9ImiM9LGBv4FRI_gf5VnP0J7dE6CLmq0-oI4waApw0bIA3TDumrXz0zzgI0a3IC-wkUUiMnT0dVa13VcOkyDx-rtrFc477kcaUUgvYj-odOfv8gBTUsFsWMl)**! **Drop off meals for an elderly relative or neighbor (on their front porch)** \- this is a great way to make a huge difference for those who are most at-risk for COVID-19. **Check out an online religious service and practice your faith** \- just because you can’t visit your place of worship doesn’t mean that you can’t continue to embrace your faith. **Learn a new hobby** \- if you get tired of watching TV or reading, there’s never been a better time to pick up a new hobby or interest. **Take a second for yourself** \- take deep breaths, stretch and disconnect from the news and social media for a few minutes (or more) every day. We hope these tips help you stay centered during this crisis. Keep hunkering down — we’ll come through this even stronger than before.
#INThisTogether, -Your Holcomb Crew |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: HEADS UP - Facebook Live tomorrow night
body:
send your questions to info@janet2020.com | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e57cb282cad6/calling-all-patriots-12430550?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=d8dfe5fee1&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | Peter,

I just wanted to stop by and let you know that **I'll be hosting a Facebook Live TOMORROW NIGHT at 6:00**.

We'll be talking all the hottest topics, including**the COVID-19 pandemic, strengthening our borders, protecting the unborn, fighting against Nancy Pelosi's radical socialist agenda**, and much more.

[**Stop in and tell us what's on your mind!**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=62d43e530c&e=795c6d9796)

As a practicing dentist for 24 years, I'd be happy to discuss any health care concerns you may have during this national crisis. I also helped run a small oil and gas business for many years, so we can chat about jobs and the economy, the impact on small businesses, government's role at various levels, and regulations.

I'll be answering the questions **sent in by you**. If you'd like to send in a question, submit it to [info@janet2020.com](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5c78181c80&e=795c6d9796).

If you'd like to get involved with our campaign, **we'd love to have you on board!** [**Sign up to volunteer here.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ed75c16b9d&e=795c6d9796)
Thanks so much and God bless.

See you tomorrow!

[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=335e94c894&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | | | | | | [](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=99f80d9298&e=795c6d9796) | [Facebook](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=093a74a696&e=795c6d9796)

Janet for CongressPO Box 20147Oklahoma City, OK 73156-0147

name: Team Pence
subject: You can’t vote without this

body:
Election Day is closer than it appears. Here’s the important dates you need to know. [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=25f51e6ec4f54ca18f1dfb20e70c71c2&_e=uGVr_By3gY9jZi5rIIi3UnN0P0Vqhi_CskF2Un5BEzyHiQLZIVzlcmvMh_itUR8zuIrypMMr-oQhnLkM9pCzLtO_9mtPPCtO_UlcG9ZY3_i1D4bBcr6wu3n7w8tSYdxgt52r7vMYfzV8p9EW1JluPQ1jyn5CAzzYw4gXd8FBybJ7urV6NojMtIN9HaVlqEr73WQlbB3Q7TRIK8kKS8qNARStJFnvr_-AjyIVjKkAEcoKvzPnKSfCBb091YLcgyafAnIJMl23tFDpqPK81Aj3rSaG_sFwg9A1X1k75_4XoQ1v0vPPHuh0WnjIi-yCNnR3HSnLcT9FDUvXrZdHnxVYYm6ViT8x37D1T2Zoqilt_Y0ficXFemleEQjKAXQc4KmO) **REMINDER: LESS THAN 1 WEEK LEFT TO REGISTER TO VOTE.** **[CLICK HERE TO REGISTER BY MAY 4>>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=25f51e6ec4f54ca18f1dfb20e70c71c2&_e=uGVr_By3gY9jZi5rIIi3UnN0P0Vqhi_CskF2Un5BEzyHiQLZIVzlcmvMh_itUR8zuIrypMMr-oQhnLkM9pCzLtO_9mtPPCtO_UlcG9ZY3_i1D4bBcr6wu3n7w8tSYdxgt52r7vMYfzV8p9EW1JluPQ1jyn5CAzzYw4gXd8FBybKAlj-mNQJOXgwtDh4WMFSBYSiE0-Vdk-KIgahZapbp7EYKeZGA3BAr9Kx7hLYUX_xe7FopzY6HdMMrZ2TrI5GLFyiVfIuEfYlKvSVwBPxoUCwyRF8gVeNPsJKm7fAmv9P2d3YW_uoWPZ3IHy8LSztb8rpDUrucYt8BjsjK3cqn9NWlAa4-tFLoN5kGthPFAnc_GaulB71LodGu46hiwozN)** Friend,
With so much at stake for conservatives across the country in the upcoming elections, we have to ensure everyone’s voice is heard loud and clear on Election Day.
_**Whether you mark your calendar, take a screenshot, or write them on a post-it note, here are the upcoming election dates you’ll need to remember:**_
* **May 4 Voter registration deadline**
* **May 21 Deadline to request absentee ballot**
* **May 26 In-person voting begins**
* **June 1 In-person voting ends**
* **June 2 Primary day**

Friend, we have the chance to take back the House this November while protecting our conservative majority in the Senate.
In order to make that happen, we need to make sure that everybody who is eligible to vote is first registered. **[Click here to register to vote by May 4>>>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=25f51e6ec4f54ca18f1dfb20e70c71c2&_e=uGVr_By3gY9jZi5rIIi3UnN0P0Vqhi_CskF2Un5BEzyHiQLZIVzlcmvMh_itUR8zuIrypMMr-oQhnLkM9pCzLtO_9mtPPCtO_UlcG9ZY3_i1D4bBcr6wu3n7w8tSYdxgt52r7vMYfzV8p9EW1JluPQ1jyn5CAzzYw4gXd8FBybJmyQcQd2IhIbsWtGA_Tg79jlysmEn3d_Mv5Yd7fP_ukn0AP9AeV9CTZEusMXwdY9i1HmMJhPwcH3LIKts6l8es8j0Cu-7eHSd4rBe8elbVH3u_ypodGqWyDChxIMFnY3975vqT_LU7y0T3zxbziZbfz1IDkHXPqPIUVDqwtW8Y6xT5-b1J5Ae2AFBOGmCDbgSMno--TXRjQxZ5mqP2DDl_)**

If you’re already set to vote, that’s great! Feel free to help us get the word out by sharing the registration form with your friends and family. [ **Share voter registration form to Facebook** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=25f51e6ec4f54ca18f1dfb20e70c71c2&_e=uGVr_By3gY9jZi5rIIi3UtXVBXWCYgPUOZ952bMO9inEq9oI_k5OuU57EgI1VV8SDP6r_0bUYXpYczCJZhPYcoZJFZcaNXaIFWHnlgwGPTJgA7-ZrqAJA5Qc7Ddn7ZrHlGmE6d5nYZReFVjnM6OI1mAwTiqZDqTRg3GJwX4Dx_MJZ1JiDid4wJ2boGeVL5yO19eYih7eHlzQ-bGqHyl_k2CwGDCr6YlWCd5qGGnJuVfmlCW5MzugM_orOhIsWx1VW4hfBx1fIKWfl6jSV5r2NqgD28HVBPsuOvqDXCTxnVgblDem9EmMB2hcjdOwdbysyZtILM2L3BJWApu6w6AbKi9QtqTr7jx40NaWGqesDkCyXmnpIYvg8E9dzpqCroay2GzwgWWw1IoTHRDuPGTUxQ%3D%3D) [ **Share voter registration form to Twitter** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=25f51e6ec4f54ca18f1dfb20e70c71c2&_e=uGVr_By3gY9jZi5rIIi3UkynFGnuDqiC6uutnzwmzyOLoTrHxC8Hlbo1JYN8k-LDwppgoHuYcXvnDRmhxq2vu7eBStIUGFiGzvZiOeT79fL7PioaEgoSPi1VaPnhCQM7_KzGAKIf_JlrRZelnOCN5gLktnohjqV7Y4P7ePz4hXNObvYxSwHeZ41e2Mp511ThyyOmqn64jZ6KA7B8TTM9514ofMMRli2K-T1zXrsJmCP8MTR0fhOLQKewX1WSICXTfXU31RynqzudlT4Oh9TirVESjkcYKrC2Mes45t11urn2Emo_XsdmRiblJUXR31DyJ55aO2dl4GommUWuYq-IAEOZ7Fd_GoNyyEHwGUAa2AsuoePNk7Iv1NMEXG3t-SpoBUQr_sEhZSY0yJZi294aMA%3D%3D) Thank you, Team Pence | |

Thank you, Team Pence | | | | | Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress | | PO Box 275 Taylorsville, IN 47280 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump is working with every state to defeat this virus
body:
At least 25 states have released formal reopening plans or criteria as of April 24. The rest have announced that such guidelines are forthcoming. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4be393da6f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 29, 2020
---
| | |
# **Reopening America, one step at a time!**

**President Trump** announced two weeks ago that America had turned a corner in its war on the Coronavirus. “The battle continues,” he said, “but the data suggests that nationwide we have passed the peak on new cases.”

**The next day** , he [unveiled guidelines](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29faf61971&e=3ee4985eea) for states to begin safely reopening our country.

**At least 25 states** have released formal reopening plans or criteria as of April 24. The rest have announced that such guidelines are forthcoming. President Trump’s three-phased approach calls for governors to evaluate specific data around new cases, covid-like symptoms, and hospital capacity in their areas before deciding how to proceed.

🎬 [Jared Kushner: “The goal here is to get people back to work.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b3239a89c9&e=3ee4985eea)

**The federal government** has all hands on deck to help. On Monday, President Trump released a [Testing Blueprint](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=be7b439dce&e=3ee4985eea) to assist states in implementing expanded testing and rapid response programs. This week, the President has already met with Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis and Louisiana Gov. John Bel Edwards about reopening their states.

**“What a job** they’ve done,” President Trump said of Louisiana’s efforts to slow the spread of Coronavirus.

**“We’ve obviously turned** the corner in Louisiana—we’re in a much, much better place than we thought was even possible five or six weeks ago,” Gov. Edwards said. “That’s because of our local partners and our Federal partners and hard work.”

**⚜️ Louisiana Governor:**[We’re able to start reopening our economy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf49d1b958&e=3ee4985eea)

**The Governor** thanked President Trump for his Administration’s response. “The field medical stations you provided, the Navy medical personnel that you sent to Louisiana, the testing that we had early was the key. And that has informed our testing strategy going forward,” he said.

**Other states** are working hard to get Americans back to work, too. In Montana, Gov. Steve Bullock announced a [phased reopening plan](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b6802f7754&e=3ee4985eea) last week that reflects President Trump’s criteria, including a multi-week decline in positive COVID-19 cases.

“**The data** is on our side, and President Trump has created a pathway to safely open up our country,” Senior Advisor Jared Kushner told Fox News today.

🎬 **President Trump:**[We’re making sure Louisiana has everything it needs](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=52e1908b40&e=3ee4985eea)

****[Great news on the horizon for COVID-19 treatments](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b6b9c00dc5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **🎬****WATCH: We built the greatest economy on Earth. Together, we’ll do it again!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=50493414d2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **The White House** hosted eight incredible small business leaders yesterday who represent the very best of American resilience and entrepreneurial grit.

**Their small businesses** suffered when the Coronavirus came to our shores. Thanks to President Trump’s Paycheck Protection Program, now they’re all making a comeback.

**The stories** they told President Trump yesterday show just how meaningful this economic relief for American small businesses really is:

* **🎬** [**Michael and Amy**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d52d7b771&e=3ee4985eea), from Bitty + Beau's Coffee, recall the moment they learned their loan was approved: “That was shocking,” Michael said.

* **🎬** [**Ali Mills**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d71f99cf46&e=3ee4985eea) helps lead a highway and bridge contracting firm outside of Pittsburgh. “With the loan funds, we were able to bring back a majority of our company.”

* **🎬** [Dr. Chris Stansbury](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ea2a511fd6&e=3ee4985eea "https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1255308916491202560"), co-founder of West Virginia Eye Consultants, called the program a "lifeline" for small businesses in dire circumstances.

* **🎬** [**Jackie Krick**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4366b81978&e=3ee4985eea) runs a small company in Virginia. “I’m a woman-owned, Hispanic business,” she says. “The PPP has helped my company tremendously. We have 30 employees we’ve been able to maintain without cutting their hours.”

* **🎬** [**Luke Bernstein**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=24478da332&e=3ee4985eea) helps run a community bank in central Pennsylvania. The PPP “has helped so many people in our communities—mechanics, delis, restaurants, pizza shop owners, construction workers...”

---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump meets with Louisiana Governor John Bel Edwards** | April 29, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ded7864b0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=53afb1875d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=12d43274fa)
---
